desc_zh: 獲得寶貝波利蛋
desc_en: Use Green Apple in the southern field of Prontera to tame a Picky Poring.

title_zh: 和依斯魯得島9點鐘方向原野的熟練的冒險家對話
title_en: Talk to Adept Adventurer in the west field of Izlude.

desc_zh: 使火屬性的蛋受到傷害
desc_en:
Use a Lv. 10 Fire-Property attack.
Deal damage to the egg using Fire-Property.

desc_zh: 歡迎加入冒險家們心目中的歇腳處——代表公會！王宮中嚴選出來的頂級公會大師正在等著你。請進入建築物內接受諮詢∼
desc_en:
Enter the building.
A place of comfort in every adventurer’s heart—join a clan! The finest Clan Master, carefully selected by the Royal Palace, is waiting for you. Enter the building and speak with them for more details~

desc_zh: 來自妖怪獵人燕元津的委託。去崑崙原野狩獵15隻元宵童子吧。
desc_en: A request from monster hunter Yan Yuanjin. Go to the Kunlun Wilderness to hunt 15 Lantern Festival boys.

title_zh: 獵捕元宵童子 - 等候
title_en: Hunting the Lantern Festival Boy - Waiting
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過元津鳶領取任務。
desc_en: This task is a daily task, and you can re-acquire and perform the task after the waiting time. Quests can be obtained through Yuanjin Yuan.

desc_zh: 來自妖怪獵人燕元津的委託。去武陵道院狩獵15隻妖仙女吧。
desc_en: A request from monster hunter Yan Yuanjin. Go to Wuling Taoist Temple to hunt 15 fairies.

desc_zh: 來自妖怪獵人燕元津的委託。去崑崙原野狩獵15隻猴桃木吧。
desc_en: A request from monster hunter Yan Yuanjin. Go to the Kunlun Wilderness to hunt 15 kiwi trees.

desc_zh: 來自妖怪獵人燕元津的委託。去武陵道院狩獵15隻人蔘精吧。
desc_en: A request from monster hunter Yan Yuanjin. Go to Wuling Taoist Temple to hunt 15 ginseng spirits.

desc_zh: 艾爾貝塔的商人凱真的委託。收集10個1x 老舊的太極盤交付給凱真吧。
desc_en: Commissioned by Cajun, a merchant from Alberta. Collect 10 1x old Tai Chi disks and deliver them to Caizhen.

title_zh: 交付老舊的太極盤 - 等候
title_en: Delivery of old Tai Chi disk - waiting
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過凱真領取任務。
desc_en: This task is a daily task, and you can re-acquire and perform the task after the waiting time. Quests can be received through Cajun.

title_en: Deliver the repaired Tai Chi disk
desc_zh: 艾爾貝塔的商人凱真的委託。收集10個1x 修好的太極盤交付給凱真吧。
desc_en: Commissioned by Cajun, a merchant from Alberta. Collect 10 1x repaired Tai Chi disks and deliver them to Caizhen.
chain_en: Deliver the repaired Tai Chi disk

title_zh: 交付修好的太極盤 - 等候
title_en: Delivery of repaired Tai Chi disk - waiting
chain_en: Deliver the repaired Tai Chi disk

desc_zh: 從探險家福蘭奇斯闊那邊聽說了「未知之地哎喲泰雅」的事。前往哎喲泰雅需要耗費巨額的航海費用。去找貿易商蒙羅漪尋求贊助吧。
desc_en: I heard about the "Unknown Land Oh Taiya" from the explorer Frankiscuo. Traveling to Aiyataya requires a huge sailing fee. Go to Trader Meng Luoyi for sponsorship.
objective_zh: 委託貿易商蒙羅漪贊助
objective_en: Sponsored by entrusted trader Munro Yi

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：前往未知之地
title_en: Ouch Taiya: Heading to the Unknown
desc_zh: 貿易商蒙羅漪承諾為哎喲泰雅提供支援。去找航海士安童尼奧打聽開往哎喲泰雅的船班吧。
desc_en: Trader Meng Luoyi promised to provide support for Ouch Taiya. Go to Antonio the Navigator and ask about the boat sailing to Ayotaya.
objective_en: Request a boat ride from Antonio

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：終於踏出第一步
title_en: Ouch Taiya: Finally taking the first step
desc_zh: 抵達了未知之地哎喲泰雅。探險家福蘭奇斯闊好像急著在找你，去看看吧。
desc_en: Arrived in an unknown place Oh Taiya. The explorer French Squaw seems to be eager to find you, go and have a look.

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：和領袖的會面
title_en: Ouch Taiya: Meeting with the Leader
desc_zh: 福蘭奇斯闊委託你在正式對哎喲泰雅展開探險之前找到哎喲泰雅的領袖。去最北邊的巨大建築物進行探索吧。
desc_en: Frankishquaw has tasked you with finding the leader of Ouitaya before officially embarking on an expedition to Ouitaya. Go explore the huge building in the far north.

desc_zh: 哎喲泰雅馬上就要舉辦潑水節了。去見佐克瓏，聽他談談關於潑水節的事吧。
desc_en: Oops, Taiya is going to hold the Water Splashing Festival soon. Go see Zokeron and listen to him talk about the Water Splashing Festival.

title_en: Ouch Taiya: Preparing for the celebration
desc_zh: 慶典負責人佐克瓏表示潑水節所需的水不夠用。去找海水淡化達人滑特盧以獲取供水吧。
desc_en: The person in charge of the festival, Zuo Kelong, said that the water required for the Songkran Festival is not enough. Go to Waterloo, the desalination guru, to get your water supply.

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：小鴛鴦的飼料
title_en: Ouch Taiya: Feed for little mandarin ducks
desc_zh: 海水淡化達人滑特盧正因為寵物小鴛鴦什麼都不吃而煩惱。前往釣魚寶地釣釣看小鴛鴦可能會想吃的食物吧。
desc_en: Waterloo, a master of desalination, is troubled because his pet little mandarin duck won't eat anything. Go to the fishing treasure spot to fish and see what the little mandarin ducks might want to eat.

desc_zh: 釣到了新鮮鱸魚，小鴛鴦應該會喜歡。餵小鴛鴦吃鱸魚看看吧。
desc_en: I caught fresh bass, and the little mandarin duck will probably like it. Let’s feed the little mandarin ducks some sea bass.
objective_en: Feed the little leopard to eat bass

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：海水淡化工作
desc_zh: 需要有巨大葉子才能進行海水淡化工作。找來10個群葉貓的巨大葉子交給滑特盧吧。
desc_en: It takes huge leaves to do the desalination work. Find 10 giant leaf cats and give them to Waterloo.
objective_en: The leaves of the group of leaf cats

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：完成潑水節準備！
title_en: Ouch Taiya: Complete Songkran Festival preparations!
desc_zh: 潑水節所需的海水淡化工作已大功告成。去告訴慶典負責人佐克瓏這件事吧。
desc_en: The desalination work required for the Water Splashing Festival has been completed. Go tell the festival leader Zokoron about this.
objective_en: Complete preparations for Water Splashing Festival

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：對妥亨坤潑水
title_en: Ouch Taiya: Throwing water on Tuo Hengkun
desc_zh: 向哎喲泰雅居民妥亨坤潑水，為他祈福吧。
desc_en: Sprinkle water on Tuo Hengkun, a resident of Oyo Atayal, and pray for him.

title_en: Ouch Taiya: Can splash water on the handkerchief
desc_zh: 向哎喲泰雅的帕能潑水，為他祈福吧。
desc_en: Sprinkle water on the Phra Nang of Ouch Taiya and pray for him.
objective_en: Can splash water on the handkerchief

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：對蒙羅漪潑水
title_en: Ouch Taiya: Throwing water on Munro Yi
desc_zh: 對貿易商蒙羅漪潑水，為他祈福吧。
desc_en: Throw water on trader Munro Yi and pray for him.

title_zh: 哎喲泰雅：通往古代神殿的路
title_en: Ouch Taiya: The Road to the Ancient Temple
desc_zh: 消滅群葉貓20隻，整頓通往古代神殿的路後去找貿易商蒙羅漪吧。
desc_en: After killing 20 leaf cats and clearing up the road leading to the ancient temple, go find the trader Munro Yi.
objective_zh: 整頓通往古代神殿的路
objective_en: Renovate the road leading to the ancient temple

desc_zh: 去找瑪莉德辣辣小姐，委託她製作夢幻的泰式BBQ吧。
desc_en: Go to Ms. Maridela and ask her to make your dream Thai BBQ.

title_zh: 從童菩那邊取得泰式BBQ所需的主食材蝦子20個。
title_en: Obtain 20 shrimps, the main ingredient required for Thai BBQ, from Tong Bo.
desc_zh: 尋求蝦子
desc_en: seeking shrimp

title_zh: 帶著購買的蝦子20個回去找瑪莉德辣辣小姐吧。
title_en: Take the 20 shrimps you purchased and go back to Miss Maridela.

title_zh: 從俊先生那邊取得泰式BBQ所需的主食材檸檬10個。
title_en: Obtain 10 lemons, the main ingredient required for Thai BBQ, from Mr. Jun.
desc_zh: 尋求檸檬
desc_en: seeking lemons

title_zh: 帶著獲得的檸檬10個回去找瑪莉德辣辣小姐吧。
title_en: Take the 10 lemons you got and go back to Miss Marid.

title_zh: 從商人那邊取得泰式BBQ所需的主食材辣椒30個。
title_en: Obtain 30 chili peppers, the main ingredient required for Thai BBQ, from the merchant.
desc_zh: 尋求辣椒
desc_en: Seeking Chili Peppers

title_zh: 帶著購買的辣椒30個回去找瑪莉德辣辣小姐吧。
title_en: Take the 30 chili peppers you purchased and go back to Ms. Marid.

title_zh: 帶著蝦子20個、檸檬10個、辣椒30個去找瑪莉德辣辣小姐，她就會幫忙製作泰式BBQ。
title_en: Bring 20 shrimps, 10 lemons, and 30 chili peppers to Miss Marid, and she will help make Thai BBQ.
desc_zh: 製作泰式BBQ料理
desc_en: Make Thai BBQ dishes

desc_zh: 04:00後可向瑪莉德辣辣小姐委託製作泰式BBQ料理
desc_en: After 04:00, you can order Thai BBQ dishes from Ms. Marid.

Box Delivery

Submit the Receipt Certificate to Masha from the Employment Office of the Merchant Guild in Alberta.

desc_zh: 受到艾爾貝塔商人公會招募組瑪莎的委託，要將回收宅配箱配送給斐揚鐵工廠的綿羊。
desc_en: At the request of Masha from the Employment Office of the Merchant Guild in Alberta, deliver the ^4D4DFFSlightly Worn Box^000000 to Sheep at the Payon Blacksmith.

desc_zh: 受到艾爾貝塔商人公會招募組瑪莎的委託，要將回收宅配箱配送給克魔島武器商店的綿羊。
desc_en: At the request of Masha from the Employment Office of the Merchant Guild in Alberta, deliver the ^4D4DFFSlightly Worn Box^000000 to Sheep at the Weapon Shop in Comodo.

title_en: Take a trip to Al De Baran.
desc_zh: 受到艾爾貝塔商人公會招募組瑪莎的委託，要將回收宅配箱配送給在艾爾帕蘭旅館等待的綿羊。
desc_en: At the request of Masha from the Employment Office of the Merchant Guild in Alberta, deliver the ^4D4DFFSlightly Worn Box^000000 to Sheep, who is waiting at the inn in Al De Baran.

desc_zh: 受到艾爾貝塔商人公會招募組瑪莎的委託，要將回收宅配箱配送給夢羅克北邊卡普拉中心職員旁的綿羊。
desc_en: At the request of Masha from the Employment Office of the Merchant Guild in Alberta, deliver the ^4D4DFFSlightly Worn Box^000000 to Sheep, located next to the northern Kafra Center staff in Morroc.

title_zh: 露天商店工讀生管理中心委託
title_en: Stall Part-Time Job Management Center Request
desc_zh: 如果想要聘請銷售/收購露天商店的工讀生，需要有商人公會所分發的聘書，一天一次，若完成瑪莎交給的委託，會依照難度提供不同等級的聘書，趕快去完成委託吧。
desc_en:
Complete Masha’s request.
To hire stall sales or purchase assistants, an Employment Certificate issued by the Merchant Guild is required. Once per day, complete a request assigned by Masha of the Merchant Guild to obtain Employment Certificates of varying grades depending on the difficulty. Complete the assigned request.
chain: 露天商店工讀生管理中心委託
chain_en: Commissioned by the Open Shop Work-Study Management Center

desc_zh: 看看吉芬的委託佈告欄有沒有值得進行的委託。
desc_en: Check Giffen's Commissions Board for any commissions worth pursuing.

desc_zh: 進行獸人記憶迷宮1樓直到最後，確認在那裡發生了什麼事。
desc_en:
Orc’s Memory Floor 1
Proceed through the 1st Floor of the Orc Memorial Dungeon to the end and uncover what happened there.

title_zh: 疲勞恢復前無法再次進入獸人的記憶。
desc_en:
Resets at 04:00
It would be difficult to explore Orc’s Memory again until you recover from fatigue.

desc_zh: 地下管理所長甜蜜的花言巧語讓你上當了。接下來發生的一切都是你的責任。
desc_en:
Conversation with the Facility Manager completed.
You fell for the overly sweet talk of the Underground Facility Manager. Any consequences that follow are entirely your responsibility.
objective_zh: 已和管理所長對話完畢。
objective_en: The conversation with the management director has been completed.

desc_zh: 在普隆德拉地下水道和骯髒的溝鼠、爬行的蟲子、幼蟲的卵、蝙蝠群戰鬥，導致全身污穢不堪，得先清洗一下才行。
desc_en: After fighting filthy sewer rats, crawling insects, larvae eggs, and swarms of bats in Prontera Culvert, you are covered in grime. You should wash up first.

title_zh: 正在等待飾品精細加工
desc_zh: 將飾品委託給可疑的加工師後，正在等在加工完成。據悉至少從委託日起算，至少要等7天。
desc_en:
Reservation Complete
You are waiting for the completion of the accessory requested from the Mysterious Artisan. It will take at least 7 days from the request date.

desc_zh: 委託可疑的加工師對受到詛咒的翡翠耳環進行加工。從委託日起算，請於7天後再來拜訪可疑的加工師。
desc_en: You have commissioned the Cursed Emerald Earring from the Mysterious Artisan. Visit the Mysterious Artisan after 7 days have passed.

title_zh: 晶瑩光芒的白寶石智力耳環
desc_zh: 委託可疑的加工師對晶瑩光芒的白寶石智力耳環進行加工。從委託日起算，請於7天後再來拜訪可疑的加工師。
desc_en: You have commissioned the Lustrous Opal Earring from the Mysterious Artisan. Visit the Mysterious Artisan after 7 days have passed.

desc_zh: 委託可疑的加工師對藍色盟誓戒指進行加工。從委託日起算，請於7天後再來拜訪可疑的加工師。
desc_en: You have commissioned the Ring of Blue Oath from the Mysterious Artisan. Visit the Mysterious Artisan after 7 days have passed.

desc_zh: 委託可疑的加工師對紅色盟誓戒指進行加工。從委託日起算，請於7天後再來拜訪可疑的加工師。
desc_en: You have commissioned the Red Oath Ring from the Mysterious Artisan. Visit the Mysterious Artisan after 7 days have passed.

desc_zh: 從委託石頭加工師製作果凍石的時間點起算，預計需要過3天才會完成製作。
desc_en: It seems the crafting will be completed after 3 days have passed since requesting the Zelostone from the Stone Processor.

title_zh: 正在製作紅蓮的果凍石
desc_zh: 已將紅蓮的果凍石委託給石頭加工師。已過3天或希望果凍石快點製作完成時請拜訪石頭加工師。
desc_en:
In Production
You have requested the Crimson Zelostone from the Stone Processor. After 3 days have passed, or if you wish to complete it instantly using Zelstar, visit the Stone Processor.

title_zh: 正在製作清風的果凍石
title_en: Wind of Verdure Zelostone In Production
desc_zh: 已將清風的果凍石委託給石頭加工師。如果已過3天或希望果凍石快點製作完成時，請拜訪石頭加工師。
desc_en: You have requested the Wind of Verdure Zelostone from the Stone Processor. After 3 days have passed, or if you wish to complete it instantly using Zelstar, visit the Stone Processor.

title_zh: 正在製作黃昏的果凍石
desc_zh: 已將黃昏的果凍石委託給石頭加工師。如果已過3天或希望果凍石快點製作完成時，請拜訪石頭加工師。
desc_en: You have requested the Dusk Zelostone from the Stone Processor. After 3 days have passed, or if you wish to complete it instantly using Zelstar, visit the Stone Processor.

title_zh: 正在製作混沌的果凍石
desc_zh: 已將混沌的果凍石委託給石頭加工師。如果已過3天或希望果凍石快點製作完成時，請拜訪石頭加工師。
desc_en: You have requested the Chaos Zelostone from the Stone Processor. After 3 days have passed, or if you wish to complete it instantly using Zelstar, visit the Stone Processor.

title_zh: 正在製作神聖的果凍石
desc_zh: 已將神聖的果凍石委託給石頭加工師。如果已過3天或希望果凍石快點製作完成時，請拜訪石頭加工師。
desc_en: You have requested the Holy Zelostone from the Stone Processor. After 3 days have passed, or if you wish to complete it instantly using Zelstar, visit the Stone Processor.

desc_zh: 記憶迷宮協會的說明聽取完畢。
desc_en: Finished listening to the explanation from the Memorial Association.

desc_zh: 探訪螞蟻地獄密穴的後遺症。次日後遺症會消失，可再次探險。
desc_en:
Access Restricted
Aftereffects from exploring the Ant Hell Memorial. The aftereffects will fade the next day, allowing you to become an Explorer again.

title_zh: 依斯魯得島迷宮後遺症
desc_zh: 探訪依斯魯得島記憶迷宮的後遺症。次日後遺症會消失，可再次探險。
desc_en: Aftereffects from exploring the Izlude Dungeon Memorial. The aftereffects will fade the next day, allowing you to become an Explorer again.

desc_zh: 探訪沉船記憶迷宮的後遺症。次日後遺症會消失，可再次探險。
desc_en: Aftereffects from exploring the Sunken Ship Memorial. The aftereffects will fade the next day, allowing you to become an Explorer again.

desc_zh: 我需要材料來製作香拌藥草。請幫忙找三葉幸運草1個、綠色藥草1個、紅色藥草1個來給我。
desc_en:
Gather Ingredients
To make Herb Salad, gather 1 Clover, 1 Green Herb, and 1 Red Herb, then bring them back.

desc_zh: 我需要材料來製作清脆沙拉。請幫忙找蘋果1個、紅蘿蔔2個來給我。
desc_en: To make Crisp Salad, gather 1 Apple and 2 Carrots, then bring them back.

desc_zh: 我需要材料來製作綜合火鍋。請幫忙找傑勒比結晶1個、毛1個、柔毛1個來給我。
desc_en: To make Anything Hotpot, gather 1 Jellopy, 1 Soft Fluff, and 1 Soft Fur, then bring them back.

desc_zh: 我需要材料來製作金黃烤蘋果。請幫忙找蘋果1個、三葉幸運草1個來給我。
desc_en: To make Golden Baked Apple, gather 1 Apple and 1 Clover, then bring them back.

desc_zh: 在4天的考慮期內，如有需要調整的部分，請和配偶進行調整或好好談一談。隨後可以前來完成離婚手續，或是取消離婚申請。- 普隆德拉區公所：離婚負責人諾頓
desc_en: During the 4-day consideration period, if there is anything that needs to be adjusted, please make adjustments or have a good talk with your spouse. You can then come in to complete the divorce process or cancel the divorce application. - Prontera District Office: Divorce Officer Norton

desc_zh: 把帝特立米藥水或卡勒波迪藥水給魯依看吧。
desc_en:
Detrimindexta and Karvodailnirol
Show either Detrimindexta or Karvodailnirol to Louitz.
objective_zh: 帝特立米藥水和卡勒波迪藥水

desc_zh: 聽說瘋狂科學家摩肯修塔尹知道帝特立米藥水和卡勒波迪藥水的用途。我也是從阿歐魯的朋那邊聽來的，不是很清楚。
desc_en:
To Geffen
I heard that a mad scientist named Morgenstein knows how to use Detrimindexta and Karvodailnirol. That’s what I heard from Aurdipon, but I don’t know the details.

desc_zh: 摩肯修塔尹住在鐵工廠2樓。不過最好不要太靠近他。
desc_en:
To Morgenstein
Morgenstein lives on the second floor of the Blacksmith. It’s best not to get too close to him.
objective_en: Go find Moken to repair Tayin

desc_zh: 可以創造出新東西？去找摩肯修塔尹問個清楚吧。
desc_en: He says he can create something new? Ask Morgenstein for more details.

desc_zh: 我的兒子莫利孫完全不吃水果。冒險家，你可以勸一勸他嗎？如果他拒絕談話的話，請拿肉給他看。
desc_en:
To Morrison
My son, Morrison, refuses to eat fruit. Could you try talking to him? If he won’t listen, show him some meat instead.

desc_zh: 莫利孫滿口喊著肉肉肉，拒絕進一步談話。去問問看瑪利亞稜該怎麼辦吧。
desc_en:
To Marianne
Morrison insisted on eating only meat and refused to talk any further. Ask Marianne what to do.

desc_zh: 聽說斐揚有人會把水果攪碎，做成方便飲用的果汁，如果是果汁的話，我的兒子說不定…
desc_en:
To Payon
I heard that at Payon, they grind fruit into juice to make it easier to consume. If it’s fruit juice, maybe my son will...

desc_zh: 帶著蘋果汁回去找普隆德拉的瑪利亞稜吧。
desc_en:
To Prontera
Bring Apple Juice and return to Marianne in Prontera.

title_en: The Curse of the Gaebolg Family
desc_zh: 去普隆德拉圖書館借書吧。
desc_en:
To the Prontera Library
Borrow a book at the Prontera Library.

title_zh: 得回去找普隆德拉的少年，向他說明圖書館的情況才行。
desc_zh: 去找少年
desc_en: Return to the Boy in Prontera and explain the situation at the library.

title_zh: 可以幫忙去紀念碑附近找正在冥想中的迪特馬爾問問看該怎麼做才好嗎？
desc_zh: 去找迪特馬爾
desc_en: Ask Dietmar, who is meditating near the monument, what should be done.

title_zh: 那麼只要去王宮借同一本書就可以了，請去吧。
desc_zh: 前往王宮？！
desc_en: Then head to the Royal Palace and borrow the same book there. Let’s go.

title_zh: 過了這道門就會看到王宮圖書館。請告訴司書圖書館員我的名字，把書借出來。
desc_zh: 王宮圖書館
desc_en: Beyond this door is the Royal Palace Library. Tell the librarian my name and borrow the book.

title_zh: 西里亞現在應該在醫務室。請去把逾期圖書收回來。
desc_zh: 回收圖書：西里亞
desc_en: Cillia should be in the infirmary. Retrieve the overdue book.

title_zh: 我弟弟弗雷德里克現在大概在教官室？抱歉，我明明有叮嚀過他一定要準時還書。
desc_zh: 回收圖書：弗雷德里克
desc_en: My younger brother, Frederick, should be in the Trainer Room by now. I’m sorry—I told him to return it on time.

title_zh: 那本書好像不小心混進喬治的行李了。急著要的話，請去吉芬塔看看吧。
desc_zh: 回收圖書：喬治
desc_en: It seems the book ended up with George’s belongings. If it’s urgent, check the Geffen Tower.

title_zh: 書已經送還王宮圖書館。得再去王宮圖書館看看。
title_en: Back to the Royal Palace Library
desc_zh: 前往王宮圖書館
desc_en: The book has already been returned to the Royal Palace Library. I should head back there.

title_zh: 在王宮圖書館中等待圖書歸還的過程中，要不時向司書圖書館員妥樂確認書是否已經歸還。
desc_zh: 和妥樂對話
desc_en: Wait at the Royal Palace Library until the book is processed, and check with Librarian Tora from time to time.

title_zh: 請到外面和我談一談吧。
desc_zh: 前往圖書館外
desc_en: Let’s talk for a moment outside with Me.

title_zh: 在這邊。在宮裡很容易迷路，請跟好我。
desc_zh: 和迪特馬爾同行
desc_en: This Way. The palace can be confusing, so please follow me closely.

title_zh: 要找冒險家的人士就在裡面，請注意禮節。
desc_zh: 前往裡面
desc_en: The person seeking you is inside. Please mind your manners.

title_zh: 先在外面把事情說完吧。
title_en: Let’s continue our conversation outside at Outside.

title_zh: 只要把這封信交給祭司班夫即可。
desc_zh: 轉交書信
desc_en: Deliver this letter to Priest Bampee.

title_zh: 班夫神父正在讀信，請等他把信讀完。
desc_zh: 稍等一下
desc_en: Priest Bampee is reading the letter. Wait until it is finished.

title_zh: 我想要萃取蜂蠟，需要獵捕蜂兵、黑蟻時會得到的50x 蜂針個或1x 蜂膠個。請幫忙找來給我。
desc_zh: 蠟的材料
desc_en: To extract wax, you will need either 50 [Bee Sting]939 obtained by hunting Hornet and Vitata, or 1 [Royal Jelly]526. Bring them to Me.

title_zh: 請把這封信轉交給那位。送信這件事必須保密。
desc_zh: 前往王宮
desc_en: Deliver this letter to Him. It must be delivered discreetly.

title_zh: 請直接將這封信轉交給那位。不知道路怎麼走的話，請找我幫你帶路。
title_en: Deliver this letter directly to Him. If you do not know the way, ask Me for guidance.

title_zh: 反正要去圖書館借書，就在王宮圖書館前聊一會吧。
desc_zh: 和迪特馬爾對話
desc_en: Since we need to visit the library to borrow the book anyway, let’s talk briefly in front of the Royal Palace Library.

title_zh: 在迪特馬爾領完通行證回來之前，先在王宮圖書館等候吧
desc_zh: 敬請期待下一篇章凱渥寶樂格家的詛咒更新。
desc_en: Wait at the Royal Palace Library until Dietmar returns with the pass.

desc_zh: 收到天地樹魔杖的介紹。
desc_en:
Explanation Complete
You have received guidance from the Yggdrasil Staff.

title_zh: 世界樹之露凝結的時間
title_en: Time for Yggdrasil Dew to Form
desc_zh: 天地樹魔杖史泰菲：凌晨過後將再次提供世界樹之露。請稍候。
desc_en: Yggdrasil Staff Stappy: I’ll give you more Yggdrasil Dew after dawn has passed. Please wait a little.

title_zh: 少年看起來有很多話想對我說，再去找他搭話吧。
desc_zh: 和少男對話
desc_en: Talk to the Boy again—he seems to have a lot to say.

desc_zh: 請代替我偷偷潛入村子的酒店，偷出四龍轉入湯的湯底。我就告訴你一個好情報。
desc_en: Please sneak into the village hotel on my behalf and steal the soup base that the Four Dragons transfer to the soup. Let me tell you some good information.

title_zh: 平安無事地偷出了四龍轉入湯的湯底。現在回去找九延甫吧。
title_en: The soup base that the Four Dragons transferred to the soup was stolen without incident. Now go back and find Jiu Yanfu.
desc_zh: 去找九延甫
desc_en: Go find Jiu Yanfu

title_zh: 辛苦了，那我就帶你去餐光我的私房美景吧！
title_en: Thank you for your hard work, then I will take you to enjoy the beautiful scenery of my private room!
desc_zh: 前往瞭望台
desc_en: Go to the lookout

title_zh: 龍之城：湯頭美味的祕訣
title_en: Dragon City: The secret to delicious soup
desc_zh: 心情很不安，你可以幫我去酒店看看情況如何嗎？
desc_en: I feel very uneasy. Can you help me go to the hotel to see how the situation is?

title_zh: 請幫忙捕捉舞獅10隻，取得新鮮的20x 舞獅之角個給我。- 王司龍
title_en: Please help capture 10 dancing lions and get 20x fresh lion dancing horns for me. - Wang Silong
desc_zh: 舞獅之角20個、舞獅10隻
desc_en: 20 lion dance horns, 10 lion dances

title_en: Waiting: The secret to delicious soup
desc_zh: 冒險家，湯還沒熬好。也就是說你昨天幫忙準備的材料目前還在熬煮中，請好好休息，凌晨過後再來吧。 - 王司龍
desc_en: Adventurer, the soup is not ready yet. In other words, the ingredients you helped prepare yesterday are still being cooked. Please have a good rest and come back after early morning. - Wang Silong

title_zh: 龍之城：王陵妖怪討伐隊
title_en: Dragon City: Wang Ling Monster Expedition Team
desc_zh: 請先前去官府報名討伐隊。這樣之後才能拿到應得的報酬。
desc_en: Please go to the government office to sign up for the expedition team in advance. Only then can you get the rewards you deserve.

title_zh: 請去找旅館內的小賢。他現在應該在2樓整理資料。
title_en: Please go find Xiaoxian in the hotel. He should be organizing information on the second floor now.
desc_zh: 位於旅館2樓的
desc_en: Located on the 2nd floor of the hotel

title_zh: 雖然很麻煩，但請先去醫院做個檢查。你知道嗎？早點發現陳年隱疾可以救你一命。
title_en: Although it is troublesome, please go to the hospital for a checkup first. Did you know? Catching age-old illnesses early can save your life.
desc_zh: 前往醫院
desc_en: Go to hospital

title_zh: 已完成體檢完成，那麼現在直接去王陵即可。請不要太勉強自己。
title_en: The physical examination has been completed, so now you can go directly to the royal tomb. Please don't push yourself too hard.
desc_zh: 去找王陵士兵
desc_en: Go to the royal tomb soldiers

title_zh: 一定要找到盜墓者進出的入口位置，這樣才能掌握盜墓者的動線及損失規模。
title_en: Be sure to find the entrance where the tomb robbers enter and exit, so that you can grasp the movement of the tomb robbers and the scale of their losses.
desc_zh: 尋找盜墓的痕跡
desc_en: Looking for signs of tomb robbing

title_zh: 請帶來擊退妖怪的證據。只要捕捉豹皮怪10隻，帶回小鬼靈1個作為證據即可。
title_en: Please bring evidence of defeating the monster. Just capture 10 leopard-skin monsters and bring back 1 little ghost as evidence.
desc_zh: 豹皮怪10隻、小鬼靈1個
desc_en: 10 leopard skin monsters, 1 little ghost

title_en: The hole dug by the tomb robbers was found!

title_zh: 快會去向官府報告，領取獎賞吧！
title_en: Report to the government soon and receive your reward!

title_zh: 龍之城：討伐妖怪豹皮怪
title_en: Dragon City: Defeat the Monster Leopard Skin Monster
desc_zh: 請在王陵消滅豹皮怪30隻即可。- 朱圍業
desc_en: Please kill 30 leopard-skinned monsters in the Royal Tomb. - Zhu Waiye

title_en: Dragon City: Defeat the Monster and Fox Fairy
desc_zh: 請在王陵消滅狐仙30隻。- 朱圍業
desc_en: Please kill 30 fox fairies in Wangling. - Zhu Waiye

desc_zh: 你才剛討伐完豹皮怪吧？多休息一下吧。 - 朱圍業
desc_en: You just finished defeating the leopard-skin monster, right? Get some more rest. - Zhu Waiye

title_en: Waiting: Crusade against monsters and fox fairies
desc_zh: 你才剛討伐完狐仙吧？多休息一下吧。 - 朱圍業
desc_en: You just finished defeating the Fox Fairy, right? Get some more rest. - Zhu Waiye

title_en: Dragon City: Monster Fighting Lion Dance
desc_zh: 受託調查盜墓者挖掘的地洞，但卻持續受到舞獅干擾。請幫忙消滅30隻。 - 小賢
desc_en: He was commissioned to investigate the cave dug by tomb robbers, but he was constantly disturbed by the lion dance. Please help eliminate 30 of them. - Xiaoxian

title_en: Waiting: Fighting Monsters and Lion Dance
desc_zh: 剩下的我自己可以想辦法。請凌晨過後再來吧。 - 小賢
desc_en: I can figure out the rest myself. Please come back after early morning. - Xiaoxian

title_en: Dragon City: Defeat the Monsters and Demon Lords
desc_zh: 我正在調查妖怪，但是妖君實在太?以我的能力實在應付不來，再這樣下去我可能會死掉。可以你幫忙懲治妖君30隻嗎?小賢
desc_en: I am investigating the monster, but the monster is too big for my ability to deal with. If this continues, I may die. Can you help punish 30 demon kings? Xiaoxian

title_en: Waiting: Crusade against monsters and monsters
desc_zh: 這樣應該就可以順利調查了。請凌晨過後再來吧。 - 小賢
desc_en: This should make the investigation smooth. Please come back after early morning. - Xiaoxian

title_en: Dragon City: Defeat the Monster Xiaoqing
desc_zh: 我正在調查消滅小青後會出現的現象。可以幫我消滅一些小青嗎？30隻左右就好。 - 小賢
desc_en: I'm investigating what will happen after Xiaoqing is eliminated. Can you help me kill some greenies? About 30 will be fine. - Xiaoxian

title_en: Waiting: Fight against the monster Xiaoqing
desc_zh: 今天這樣應該足夠了。凌晨過後再重新收集就好。 - 小賢
desc_en: That should be enough for today. Just collect it again after early morning. - Xiaoxian

title_en: Dragon City: Hospital of Dragon City
desc_zh: 請問有哪裡不舒服嗎？請到裡面掛號並接受診療吧。
desc_en: Are you feeling uncomfortable somewhere? Please come inside to register and receive medical treatment.

title_zh: 領智醫生好像正忙著看急診病患。稍候片刻再來吧。
title_en: Doctor Lingzhi seems to be busy seeing emergency patients. Come back later.
desc_zh: 再次去找領智醫生
desc_en: Go see Dr. Lingzhi again

title_zh: 請去找道具店的王師傅抓藥。
title_en: Please go to Master Wang in the prop shop to get some medicine.
desc_zh: 去找道具店店主
desc_en: Go to the prop shop owner

title_zh: 有個叫章荷友的守倉員，只要拜託那傢伙，他就會幫你找東西。
title_en: There is a warehouse guard named Zhang Heyou. Just ask that guy and he will help you find things.
desc_zh: 拜訪倉庫
desc_en: Visit the warehouse

title_zh: 請去官府領取一份文件。要領取的文件是居住地轉移申請書。
title_en: Please go to the government office to get a document. The document to be collected is the application for transfer of residence.
desc_zh: 前往官府領取文件
desc_en: Go to the government office to collect documents

title_zh: 請去官府領取一份文件。要領取的文件是數學能力評鑑備考特講報名表。
title_en: Please go to the government office to get a document. The document to be collected is the registration form for the special lecture on preparation for the Mathematics Ability Assessment.
desc_zh: 5_F_CHNWOMAN
desc_en: 5_F_CHNWOMAN

title_zh: 請去官府領取一份文件。要領取的文件是龍之城黃沙相關報告。
title_en: Please go to the government office to get a document. The document to be collected is the report related to Dragon City Yellow Sand.
desc_zh: 6_F_CHNWOMAN
desc_en: 6_F_CHNWOMAN

title_zh: 請去官府領取一份文件。要領取的文件是店長店員相互合作方案。
title_en: Please go to the government office to get a document. The document to be collected is the store manager and clerk mutual cooperation plan.
desc_zh: 7_F_CHNWOMAN
desc_en: 7_F_CHNWOMAN

title_zh: 不要就算了。藥材就在這裡，你自己去找吧。 - 章荷友
title_en: Don't forget it. The medicinal materials are here, go find them yourself. - Zhang Heyou
desc_zh: 在材料堆中尋找藥材
desc_en: Find medicinal materials in the material pile

title_zh: 翻找材料堆翻到快要發瘋。拜託章荷友幫忙吧。
title_en: Digging through piles of materials drove me crazy. Please help Zhang Heyou.
desc_zh: 去找章荷友
desc_en: Go find Zhang Heyou

title_zh: 那個嗎？請往我左邊走，去找負責管理龍之城的金積元。去的時候最好帶上香氣迷人的橘色異國水果，大概5個左右
title_en: That one? Please go to my left to find Jin Jiyuan who is responsible for managing Dragon City. It’s best to bring some attractive orange exotic fruits with you when you go, about 5 of them.
desc_zh: 準備5顆柳橙吧
desc_en: Prepare 5 oranges

title_zh: 金積元生氣地拒絕對話。剛剛是不是有說要帶5顆香氣迷人的橘色異國水果
title_en: Kim Ji-won angrily refused to talk. Did you just say that you would bring 5 orange exotic fruits with charming aroma?
desc_zh: 柳橙5個
desc_en: 5 oranges

title_zh: 請去找2樓的文件負責職員領取居住地轉移申請書。
title_en: Please go to the document clerk on the 2nd floor to get the application for transfer of residence.
desc_zh: 2樓的文件負責職員
desc_en: The person in charge of documents on the second floor

title_zh: 請去找2樓的文件負責職員領取數學能力評鑑特講報名表。
title_en: Please go to the document manager on the 2nd floor to get the registration form for the special lecture on mathematics ability assessment.

title_zh: 請去找2樓的文件負責職員領取龍之城黃沙相關報告。
title_en: Please go to the document manager on the 2nd floor to get the report related to Dragon City Yellow Sand.

title_zh: 請去找2樓的文件負責職員領取店長店員相互合作方案。
title_en: Please go to the document manager on the 2nd floor to receive the store manager and store employee mutual cooperation plan.

title_zh: 收到想要的文件了，快點回去找章荷友，把文件拿給他吧。
title_en: I have received the documents I wanted. Go back to Zhang Heyou quickly and give him the documents.

desc_zh: 拜託你去捕捉噬人樹花5個和米糕10隻並取得泥團5個，這些都可以在南邊城門外都輕易取得。- 領智
desc_en: Please capture 5 man-eating tree flowers, 10 rice cakes and 5 mud balls. These can be easily obtained outside the southern city gate. - Lingzhi

desc_zh: 你之前工作消耗的氣力應該還沒完全復原，這麼快又來找我了嗎？養精蓄銳是很重要的。請凌晨過後再來找我吧。- 領智
desc_en: You probably haven't fully recovered from the energy you used in your previous work. Are you coming to see me again so soon? It is important to recharge your batteries. Please come back to me after midnight. - Lingzhi

title_zh: 拜託你去捕捉噬人樹花5個和米糕10隻並取得泥團15個，這些都可以在南邊城門外都輕易取得。- 領智
title_en: Please capture 5 man-eating tree flowers, 10 rice cakes and 15 mud balls. These can be easily obtained outside the southern city gate. - Lingzhi
desc_zh: 噬人樹花5、泥團15
desc_en: Man-Eating Tree Flower 5, Mud Ball 15

title_zh: 龍之城：製作白素貞造型帽子和小青的丸子頭飾
title_en: Dragon City: Making Bai Suzhen’s hat and Xiaoqing’s ball headdress
desc_zh: 姊姊平常這個時間應該都在酒店的池塘邊整理思緒。請幫我把這封信交給她
desc_en: My sister usually spends this time gathering her thoughts by the pond in the hotel. Please help me give this letter to her

title_zh: 請幫我把這個交給召天。他看到應該就會理解了。
title_en: Please help me give this to Zhaotian. He should understand when he sees it.
desc_zh: 去找召天
desc_en: Go to Zhaotian

title_zh: 1x 白素貞造型帽子\n 製作方法1：白蛇之淚10個、迷思力5個、地龍石200個、小鬼靈300個、舞獅的假牙300個、乾沙子500個或是\n 製作方法2： 迷思力5個、地龍石1200個、小鬼靈300個、舞獅的假牙300個、乾沙子500個。只要這些東西給我，我就會幫你製作。
title_en: 1x Bai Suzhen style hat\n Production method 1: 10 White Snake Tears, 5 Myth Power, 200 Earth Dragon Stones, 300 Little Ghost Spirits, 300 Lion Dance Dentures, 500 Dry Sand or something\n Production Method 2: 5 Myth Power, 1200 Earth Dragon Stones, 300 Little Ghost Spirits, 300 Lion Dance Dentures, and 500 Dry Sand. As long as you give me these things, I will help you make them.
desc_zh: 白素貞造型帽子的材料
desc_en: Materials of Bai Suzhen's style hat

title_zh: 只要帶丸子頭飾1個、藍色發亮鱗片50個、迷思力1個、地龍石100個、乾沙子500個、豹紋內褲300個、小鬼靈50個來，我就會幫你製作1x 小青的丸子頭飾。- 召天
title_en: As long as you bring 1 ball headdress, 50 blue shiny scales, 1 myth power, 100 earth dragon stones, 500 dry sand, 300 leopard print underwear, and 50 little ghosts, I will help you make 1x Xiao Qing's ball headdress. - Zhaotian
desc_zh: 小青的丸子頭飾材料
desc_en: Xiaoqing’s meatball headdress material

desc_zh: 第一次來龍之城嗎？那就去找名叫勳卯的人吧。他會告訴你很多指點為人處世之道的好故事。
desc_en: Is it your first time to visit Dragon City? Then go find someone named Xun Mao. He will tell you many good stories that will teach you how to live in the world.
objective_en: Go find the hermit Xun Mao

desc_zh: 奈喀許似乎有很多隱情。再找他搭話，聽聽他的故事吧。
desc_en: Nakash seems to have a lot of secrets. Talk to him again and listen to his story.
objective_zh: 和奈喀許耶日謝斯對話

title_zh: 或許看到跟與毒物相關的東西就會想起來。解毒劑或是觸媒劑之類的 - 奈喀許
title_en: Maybe when you see something related to poisons, you will think of it. An antidote or a catalyst - Nakash
desc_zh: 準備解毒劑後和奈喀許對話
desc_en: After preparing the antidote, talk to Nekash

title_zh: 真是多虧了年輕人，我開始慢慢想起以前喜歡的詩。 - 奈喀許
title_en: Thanks to young people, I slowly began to remember the poems I used to like. -Nakash

title_zh: 老夫雖然有點老糊塗了，但至少知道意思不同。
title_en: Although I am a bit old and confused, at least I know the meaning is different.

title_zh: 奈喀許耶日謝斯沉浸在往日的回憶中，再次找他對話，聽聽他有什麼回憶吧。
title_en: Nekashyezhishes is immersed in the memories of the past. Let's talk to him again and hear what memories he has.

title_zh: 奈喀許耶日謝斯談到了和太守之間的事。不能再多說一點嗎？
title_en: Nekashyezhishes talked about what happened with the prefect. Can't you say a little more?

title_zh: 去找他僅存的弟子宋知毒吧，說不定他知道些什麼。
title_en: Go find his only remaining disciple Song Zhidu, maybe he knows something.
desc_zh: 去找宋知毒
desc_en: Go find Song Zhidu

title_zh: 宋知毒聽完原委後，仍生氣地說無法感同身受。
title_en: After Song Zhidu heard the whole story, he still said angrily that he could not empathize with her.
desc_zh: 和宋知毒對話
desc_en: Talk to Song Zhidu

title_zh: 宋知毒說請稍等一下。等一下再找他講話吧。
title_en: Song Zhidu said please wait a moment. Talk to him later.

title_zh: 煉製毒藥還缺幾樣材料。請幫我找來蜂針4個、毒牙10個、空藥瓶10個、綠色藥水30個。 - 宋知毒
title_en: There are still a few materials missing to refine the poison. Please help me find 4 bee stings, 10 poison fangs, 10 empty medicine bottles, and 30 green potions. - Song Zhidu
desc_zh: 毒藥的材料
desc_en: poison material

title_zh: 可以幫我到村子口找賣鞭炮的小姐拿一些東西嗎？
title_en: Can you help me go to the village entrance to find the lady selling firecrackers to get some things?
desc_zh: 龍之城南門外
desc_en: Outside the south gate of Dragon City

title_zh: 拿到東西了，去交給宋知毒吧。
title_en: Now that you've got the stuff, go give it to Song Zhidu.

title_zh: 請問可以再幫我找相同的材料來嗎？蜂針4個、毒牙10個、空藥瓶10個、綠色藥水30個、巨大傑勒比結晶1個，拜託了。- 宋知毒
title_en: Could you please help me find the same materials again? 4 bee stings, 10 fangs, 10 empty medicine bottles, 30 green potions, and 1 giant Jelebi crystal, please. - Song Zhidu

title_zh: 宋知毒給了我毒藥。用這個要怎麼報仇呢？
title_en: Song Zhidu gave me poison. How can I take revenge with this?

title_zh: 宋知毒要求把毒藥灑在太守可能觸碰到的地方。不過也想先把消息告訴師父一聲。該先去哪邊呢？
title_en: Song Zhidu asked that the poison be sprinkled on places where the prefect might touch it. But I also want to tell Master the news first. Which way should we go first?
desc_zh: 二選一
desc_en: Choose one

title_zh: 把毒倒進了太守愛用的酒瓶裡。回去向宋知毒報告吧。
title_en: He poured the poison into the wine bottle favored by the prefect. Go back and report to Song Zhidu.

title_zh: 奈喀許耶日謝斯看見弟子做的毒藥後陷入了沉思。再次找他對話吧。
title_en: After seeing the poison made by his disciples, Nekashyez fell into deep thought. Talk to him again.

title_zh: 太守很喜歡喝酒。得準備空瓶和粘稠液體各1個來代替他的酒瓶。
title_en: The prefect likes to drink very much. You need to prepare an empty bottle and a viscous liquid to replace his wine bottle.
desc_zh: 前往太守宮
desc_en: Go to Taishou Palace

title_zh: 調換了太守愛用的酒瓶。回去向奈喀許報告吧。
title_en: The wine bottle favored by the prefect was replaced. Go back and report to Naikash.
desc_zh: 去找奈喀許耶日謝斯
desc_en: Go to Nekashyezhesh

title_zh: 請將書信轉交給奈喀許耶日謝斯。
title_en: Please forward the letter to Nekashyezhishes.

title_zh: 也請將書信轉交給宋知毒。
title_en: Please also forward the letter to Song Zhidu.

title_zh: 得募集八名同伴才行。請去找柳嘯，告訴他是我派你去的，他自然會看著辦。
title_en: You need to recruit eight companions. Please go find Liu Xiao and tell him that I sent you, and he will naturally take care of it.
desc_zh: 去找柳嘯
desc_en: Go find Liu Xiao

title_zh: 酒店裡有個合適的人選，跟過我來吧。
title_en: There is a suitable candidate in the hotel. Come with me.
desc_zh: 前往酒店
desc_en: Go to hotel

title_zh: 是在廣場上賣紀念品給觀光客的商人。名字好像叫華天。快去吧。
title_en: He is a merchant who sells souvenirs to tourists in the square. The name seems to be Hua Tian. Go ahead.
desc_zh: 前往廣場
desc_en: Go to the square

title_zh: 在募集同伴嗎？既然如此，請去找武林高手朗朗吧。他一定會是有力的生力軍。
title_en: Are you recruiting companions? In this case, please go find the martial arts master Lang Lang. He will definitely be a powerful force.
desc_zh: 去找朗朗
desc_en: Go find Lang Lang

title_zh: 和我坐牢時隔壁牢房的鄰居合作如何？那個人在武器店工作。
title_en: How about working with my neighbor in the cell next to me while I’m in jail? The man works in a weapons shop.
desc_zh: 前往武器店
desc_en: Go to the weapon shop

title_zh: 這樣說來，我腦中的確有浮現一個值得視為同伴的人。去城牆那邊看看吧。
title_en: Having said that, I do have someone in my mind who is worthy of being considered a companion. Go and have a look at the city wall.
desc_zh: 前往城牆
desc_en: Go to the city wall

title_zh: 已經聚齊同伴了。那就回去找勳卯先生，聽聽下一步的計畫是什麼吧。
title_en: The companions have been gathered. Then go back to Mr. Xun Mao and hear what the next plan is.
desc_zh: 去找勳卯
desc_en: Go find Xun Mao

title_zh: 帶著泥團1個去找火藥製造專家吧。記住，一定要是1個。
title_en: Take 1 clay ball to the gunpowder manufacturing expert. Remember, it must be 1.
desc_zh: 帶著火藥前往太守宮
desc_en: Take the gunpowder to the Taishou Palace

title_zh: 帶著鐵礦石1個去找火藥製造專家吧。記住，一定要是1個。
title_en: Take 1 iron ore to the gunpowder manufacturing expert. Remember, it must be 1.

title_zh: 不能被檢查的士兵發現有火藥，要藏好再出去。請一定要平安無事地交給勳卯先生。
title_en: Soldiers who cannot be inspected find gunpowder and have to hide it before going out. Please be sure to hand it over to Mr. Hoonmao safely.

title_zh: 昆莎對於要不要涉足這件事猶豫不決。試著再說服他看看吧。
title_en: Kunsha was hesitant to get involved. Let's try to convince him again.
desc_zh: 說服昆莎
desc_en: Convince Kunsa

title_zh: 華天擔心生計問題，猶豫是否參加。試著再說服他看看吧。
title_en: Hua Tian was worried about his livelihood and hesitated to participate. Let's try to convince him again.
desc_zh: 說服華天
desc_en: Convince Huatian

title_zh: 朗朗拒絕和勳卯合作。試著再說服他看看吧。
title_en: Lang Lang refused to cooperate with Xun Mao. Let's try to convince him again.
desc_zh: 說服朗朗
desc_en: Convince Lang Lang

title_zh: 和渼衣之間對於大方向問題發生爭論。試著再說服他看看吧。
title_en: There was a dispute with Mei Yi about the general direction. Let's try to convince him again.
desc_zh: 說服渼衣
desc_en: Convince Mie Yi

title_zh: 梁平說無法在信念問題上讓步，因此拒絕。試著再說服他看看吧。
title_en: Liang Ping said he could not compromise on the issue of faith, so he refused. Let's try to convince him again.
desc_zh: 說服梁平
desc_en: Convince Liang Ping

desc_zh: 我對愛妻便當事件感到很抱歉，哈哈哈…為了表示歉意，我會讓你搶先體驗異常狀態！！
desc_en:
Talk to Instructor Minz Again
Sorry about the wife’s lunchbox incident. Ha-ha-ha... To make it up to you, I’ll let you experience a Status Ailment in advance!
objective_zh: 與教官麥因斯再次對話

desc_zh: 憋氣20秒後再找我對話！
desc_en:
Talk to Instructor Argos After 20 Seconds
Hold your breath for 20 seconds, then talk to me!
objective_en: After 20 seconds, instructor Alec will talk to

title_en: Soft and Slippery Special Dragon Beard Noodles
desc_zh: 料理師湯純水表示特製龍鬚湯麵是克魔島的代表料理。
desc_en:
Talk to Guk Sunsu
Chef Guk Sunsu says Special Dragon Beard Noodles is Comodo’s signature dish.

desc_zh: 料理師饅豆耶表示直火麵包包子是唯一能代表克魔島的料理。
desc_en:
Talk to Mantue
Chef Mantue Tara insists the Breath Dumpling is the one and only signature dish of Comodo.

title_zh: 克魔島元祖海龍老太太料理對決
title_en: Comodo Original Sea Dragon Grandmother Cooking Showdown
desc_zh: 去找克魔比 老人家談談吧，聽說他有能夠化解兩人紛爭的對策。
desc_en:
Talk to Komobi
Talk to the elder Komobi, who says they have a solution to this dispute.

desc_zh: 湯純水好像需要冒險家的幫忙才能完成龍鬚湯麵。
desc_en: It seems Guk Sunsu needs an adventurer’s help to finish the Dragon Beard Noodles.

desc_zh: 饅豆耶好像需要冒險家的幫忙才能完成麵包包子。
desc_en: It seems Mantue Tara needs an adventurer’s help to complete the Breath Dumplings.

desc_zh: 去找可以從卡拉蟹得到的2x 鉗子個給湯純水吧，那是龍鬚湯麵的獨門祕方材料。
desc_en:
Bring 2 Nipper to Guk Sunsu
Collect 2 [Nipper]960 from Crab, a key ingredient for Dragon Beard Noodles, and bring them to Guk Sunsu.
objective_en: Give 2 tongs to soup pure water

title_zh: 只有冒險家有辦法找到
title_en: Only You Can Get This for Me!
desc_zh: 去找可以從斐揚洞穴 1樓背上得到的2x 芽苗個給[饅豆耶]comodo,108,205,0,101,0吧，那是麵包包子的必要材料。
desc_en:
Bring 2 Sprouts to Mantue
Collect 2 [Sprout]711 from Red Plant, found in areas such as Payon Cave Floor 1, then bring them to Mantue Tara.

desc_zh: 去告訴克魔比兩人已完成料理。
desc_en: Tell Komobi when both dishes are ready.

desc_zh: 將兩人的料理送去給海邊的觀光客吧。
desc_en:
Deliver the Food to Yuuji
Deliver both dishes to the Beach Tourist.

title_zh: 將兩人的料理送去給海邊的觀光客吧。
desc_zh: 把料理送去給公孫河
desc_en: Deliver both dishes to the Beach Tourist.

title_zh: 將兩人的料理送去給海邊的居民吧。
desc_zh: 把料理送去給洛魯塔
desc_en: Deliver both dishes to the Beach Resident.

desc_zh: 料理都送到了，現在回去找魔克比，嚐嚐看味道吧。
desc_en: Now that all plates have been delivered, return to Komobi and taste the results.

desc_zh: 詢問海邊的觀光客品嚐完兩人料理的心得。
desc_en:
Talk to Yuuji
Ask the Beach Tourist what they thought of both dishes.

title_zh: 詢問海邊的觀光客品嚐完兩人料理的心得。
desc_zh: 和公孫河對話
desc_en: Ask the Beach Tourist what they thought of both dishes.

title_zh: 詢問海邊居民品嚐完兩人料理的心得。
desc_zh: 和洛魯塔對話
desc_en: Ask the Beach Resident what they thought of both dishes.

desc_zh: 去找魔克比，告訴他收集到的心得。
desc_en: Report the feedback you gathered to Komobi.

desc_zh: 聽聽直接現身於混亂現場的馬塔蘭的故事吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Matallan
Listen to what Matallan Tara has to say after coming out to the scene personally.

title_en: A Story You’ve Never Heard Before
desc_zh: 聽聽直接現身於現場的湯罐子的故事吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Guk Danji
Listen to what Guk Danji has to say after coming out to the scene personally.

desc_zh: 把據說能為賭徒帶來幸運的龍鬚糖送去克魔島賭場吧。
desc_en:
Deliver Candy to Hongbi
Deliver Dragon Beard Candy, said to bring luck to Gamblers, to the Comodo Casino.
objective_en: Send the Dragon Beard Candy to Hong Fei

title_zh: 把據說能為賭徒帶來幸運的龍鬚糖送去克魔島賭場吧。
desc_zh: 把龍鬚糖送去給塞爾托朗
desc_en: Deliver Dragon Beard Candy, said to bring luck to Gamblers, to the Comodo Casino.
chain: 把據說能為賭徒帶來幸運的龍鬚糖送去克魔島賭場吧。
chain_en: Send the Dragon Beard Candy, which is said to bring luck to gamblers, to the Magic Island Casino.

title_zh: 把據說能為賭徒帶來幸運的龍鬚糖送去克魔島賭場吧。
desc_zh: 把龍鬚糖送去給克勒透
desc_en: Deliver Dragon Beard Candy, said to bring luck to Gamblers, to the Comodo Casino.
chain: 把據說能為賭徒帶來幸運的龍鬚糖送去克魔島賭場吧。
chain_en: Send the Dragon Beard Candy, which is said to bring luck to gamblers, to the Magic Island Casino.

desc_zh: 跟院童們一起玩捉迷藏，把四處躲藏的普隆德拉育幼院院童找出來吧。
desc_en:
Find Judy
Find the Child from the Prontera Daycare who ran off to hide.

title_zh: 跟院童們一起玩捉迷藏，把四處躲藏的普隆德拉育幼院院童找出來吧。
desc_zh: 尋找科德莉亞
desc_en: Find the Child from the Prontera Daycare who ran off to hide.
chain: 跟院童們一起玩捉迷藏，把四處躲藏的普隆德拉育幼院院童找出來吧。
chain_en: Play hide-and-seek with the children and find the children of Prontela Nursery who are hiding everywhere.

title_zh: 跟院童們一起玩捉迷藏，把四處躲藏的普隆德拉育幼院院童找出來吧。
desc_zh: 尋找潔茵
desc_en: Find the Child from the Prontera Daycare who ran off to hide.
chain: 跟院童們一起玩捉迷藏，把四處躲藏的普隆德拉育幼院院童找出來吧。
chain_en: Play hide-and-seek with the children and find the children of Prontela Nursery who are hiding everywhere.

title_zh: 跟院童們一起玩捉迷藏，把四處躲藏的普隆德拉育幼院院童找出來吧。
desc_zh: 尋找希司
desc_en: Find the Child from the Prontera Daycare who ran off to hide.
chain: 跟院童們一起玩捉迷藏，把四處躲藏的普隆德拉育幼院院童找出來吧。
chain_en: Play hide-and-seek with the children and find the children of Prontela Nursery who are hiding everywhere.

desc_zh: 已找到所有的孩子並送回老師身邊。，回去找老師確認一下吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Irisoph
You’ve found all the children and sent them back. Return to Teacher to report in.

title_en: Turtle Island: Records of Turtle Island
desc_zh: 老人說想了解龜島的話，就去艾爾貝塔港口閱讀航海日誌。
desc_en: The old man said that if you want to know more about Turtle Island, you should go to Port Albert and read the logbook.

title_zh: 龜島：一等航海士高丹富羅
title_en: Turtle Island: Navigation Officer 1st Class Gao Danfuluo
desc_zh: 讀完航海日誌了。帶著航海日誌的老人高丹富羅應該知道些什麼。
desc_en: Finished reading the logbook. The old man Gao Danfulo with the logbook should know something.

desc_zh: 有人需要這份紀錄…去找艾爾貝塔的恩庇吧。
desc_en: Someone needs this record...go find Alberta's grace.

desc_zh: 艾爾貝塔的恩庇的父母在探勘期間失蹤，他想要打聽他們的消息。去找艾爾貝塔旅館的酒鬼老人詢問龜島的事，說不定會得到解答。
desc_en: Albert's Grace's parents disappeared during the exploration, and he wanted to get news about them. Go to the old drunkard at the Alberta Hotel and ask about Turtle Island, and you might get an answer.
objective_en: Talk to the old man in the hotel

desc_zh: 想要向雨檀族的族長卡樂喀坦學習語言，首先要了解雨檀族。
desc_en:
Return After Observing the Utan Tribe
The Utan Tribe chief, Karkatan, says you must first understand the Utan Tribe before learning their language.
objective_en: Return after observing the Yutan tribe

title_zh: 雨檀族的族長卡樂喀坦表示只要把1x 羽毛個、1x 墨汁個、10x 巨大葉子張找來給他，他就會教汶巴拉的語言。
desc_zh: 準備材料後返回
desc_en: The Utan Tribe chief, Karkatan, says he will teach you the Umbala language if you bring 1 [Bird Feather]916, 1 [Ink]1024, and 10 [Large Leaf]7198.

title_zh: 汶巴拉薩滿的特殊能力
desc_zh: 雨檀族的薩滿普初恰樂坦表示如果想要得到自己的幫助，要先經過卡樂喀坦的許可再回來找他。
desc_en:
Return with the Chief’s Permission
The Utan Tribe shaman, Puchuchartan, says that if you want his help, you must first obtain permission from the chief, Karkatan, and then return.
objective_en: Return after getting permission from the clan leader

title_zh: 汶巴拉小朋友用生澀的語言打招呼，好像是跟雨檀族的族長卡樂喀坦學的…
desc_zh: 拜訪雨檀族族長
desc_en: A child from Umbala greets you in clumsy speech. It seems the child learned it from the Utan Tribe chief, Karkatan...

desc_zh: 受到斐揚某位老人家的委託，要把在水井裡的酒拉起來。試著一鼓作氣地把旁邊水井中裝著酒的吊桶拉上來吧。
desc_en:
Draw the Bucket from the Well
An old man in Payon asked you to pull up liquor he left submerged in a well. Lift the bucket of liquor from the nearby well in one go.
objective_zh: 把吊桶從水井裡拉上來
objective_en: Pull the bucket up from the well

desc_zh: 爺爺的孫子從斐揚北部弓箭手村偷偷溜走了，得找到他才行。去找弓箭手村[洞穴旁的警備兵pay_arche,41,133,0,101,0問問看吧。
desc_en:
Talk to the Cave Guard
You must find the grandson of Grandpa, who secretly left the Archer Village north of Payon. Ask the Cave-front Guard, who is said to be in the Archer Village.

desc_zh: 聽說雷諾跑去找孫子到現在還留在洞穴裡。既然都被點名了，也不能不去。去斐揚洞穴找雷諾吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Reno Inside the Cave
Reno, who went to look for the grandson, is still inside the cave. Since you were pointed out directly, there’s no turning back. Find Reno in the Payon Cave.
objective_en: Talk to Raynor in the cave

desc_zh: 為了一看到腐屍就會嚇壞的雷諾，必須消滅周圍的腐屍5隻。
desc_en:
Hunt Zombie for Reno
For Reno, who is terrified of Zombie, defeat 5 nearby Zombie.

desc_zh: 由於腐屍和邪骸戰士越來越多，斐揚警備兵忙得不可開交。為了減少數量，收到了消滅腐屍10隻、邪骸戰士20隻的委託。要深入洞穴一點才會出現邪骸戰士。
desc_en:
Eliminate Undead in the Payon Cave
With the growing numbers of Zombie and Skeleton, the Guard in Payon is overwhelmed. To thin their ranks, you were asked to defeat 10 Zombie and 20 Skeleton. The Skeleton appear deeper inside the cave.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚弓箭手村的警備兵領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from the Payon Archer Village Guard.

desc_zh: 為了淨化因為村莊被掩埋而悲痛怨恨的怨靈，需要「金魂符」。請壓制殭屍和妖道並收集金魂符。殭屍和妖道會出現在斐揚洞穴 3樓。
desc_en:
15 Golden Charm
To purify the restless spirits filled with resentment from a long-buried village, Golden Charm are required. Defeat Munak and Bongun to collect Golden Charm. Munak and Bongun appear on Payon Cave Floor 3.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚弓箭手村的警備兵領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from the Payon Archer Village Guard.

desc_zh: 道行高深的僧人要求你用清澈的酒安撫鬼火，並取得最後一口氣10個。清酒可從斐揚的爺爺那邊取得，鬼火會在斐揚洞穴4樓廢村出現。
desc_en:
10 Last Breath
A monk with strong spiritual power asks you to soothe Spirit Light with clear liquor and bring back 10 Last Breath. Clear liquor can be obtained from Grandpa in Payon, and Spirit Light appears in the Abandoned Village on Payon Cave Floor 4.
chain_en: Soothe sadness with a glass of wine

title_zh: 用一杯酒撫慰悲傷-等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚迷宮2樓的流浪和尚領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from the Homeless Acolyte on Payon Dungeon Floor 2.
chain_en: Soothe sadness with a glass of wine

desc_zh: 雖然不知道為什麼要有少女手帕才能尋找魔法的痕跡，但在青年學士的委託之下，需要取得少女手帕3張。少女手帕可向斐揚洞穴廢村出現的少女取得。
desc_en:
3 Girl's Handkerchief
It’s unclear why Girl's Handkerchief are needed to trace powerful magic, but at the request of Young Scholar, you need 3 Girl's Handkerchief. They can be obtained from Sohee in the Abandoned Village of the Payon Cave.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚的青年學士領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from Young Scholar in Payon.

desc_zh: 廢村中的靈魂之所以無法成佛，被束縛在原地，都是狐妖月夜貓搞的鬼。斐揚的長老為了削弱月夜貓的力量，決定處決九尾狐。處決九尾狐後，帶著獲得的狐狸天珠10個 去找[佛像前長老]pay_arche,139,33,0,101,0吧。
desc_en:
Collect 10 Fox Marble
The reason spirits remain bound in the Abandoned Village is the fox demon Moonlight Flower. The Elder of Payon decided to subdue Nine Tail to weaken Moonlight Flower. After defeating ^4D4DFFNine Tail^000000 and obtaining ^4D4DFF10 Fox Marble^000000, go to Elder before the Buddha statue.

desc_zh: 廢村的月夜貓用著自己的騙術和計謀假裝送命，始終不離開廢村。也許月夜貓也和其他靈魂一樣，原本就是因為枉死而留在原地的冤魂也不一定。
desc_en: The Moonlight Flower of the Abandoned Village never leaves, using countless tricks and deceptions, sometimes even offering up false lives. Perhaps Moonlight Flower itself is also a mass of vengeful spirits, left behind by an unjust death like the others.

desc_zh: 從長老那邊聽說斐揚村形成的歷史。
desc_en: You listened to Elder speak about the founding of the village of Payon.

desc_zh: 出門去砍柴的兒子遲遲未歸。兒子阿佑好像去斐揚南邊森林砍柴了，去找他吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Happy Dong Dong
He says his son never returned after going out to gather firewood. His son, Dongdong, seems to have gone to the southern forest of Payon. Go look for him.

desc_zh: 想要砍樹的話，就要抓住樹精並取得「世界樹枝」才行，但他說這對自己來說太困難了。替阿佑捕捉樹精3隻，並取得「世界樹枝」2個給他吧。
desc_en:
2 Dried Wood Piece
To gather firewood, one must defeat Willow and obtain Dried Wood Piece, but it’s too much for him to handle alone. Defeat 3 Willow for Dongdong and bring back 2 Dried Wood Piece.

desc_zh: 決定幫兒子砍樹。在斐揚南邊森林抓到「樹精」5隻並取得「世界樹枝」3個後，拿去給焦急等待的 中年男子吧。
desc_en:
3 Dried Wood Piece
You decided to gather firewood in place of his son. Defeat 5 Willow in the southern forest of Payon and collect 3 Dried Wood Piece, then deliver them to the Middle-aged Man who is waiting anxiously.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚村的焦慮中年男子領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from the Anxious Man in Payon.

title_zh: 為了孩子們而採取的措施
desc_zh: 斐揚東邊森林有「青蛇」出沒，為了擔心孩子們受傷的小姐前去消滅「青蛇」吧。
desc_en:
Hunt Boa
For the Lady who fears children may get hurt by the Boas in the eastern forest of Payon, defeat the Boas.

desc_zh: 決定繼續獵捕斐揚東邊森林的青蛇。今天就消滅青蛇5隻吧。
desc_en: You decided to hunt Boas regularly in the eastern forest of Payon. Defeat 5 Boas today.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚的擔心的小姐領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from the Anxious Lady in Payon.

desc_zh: 斐揚的奶奶說在森林裡看到了奇形怪狀的洋蔥。為了確認那種叫做「森靈」的洋蔥到底是不是真正的洋蔥，要求你捕捉森靈並取得「鱗片梗」1個。
desc_en:
1 Scaled Stem
The Grandmother of Payon claims she saw a strangely shaped onion in the forest. That onion, called Worm Tail, may not be a real onion. Defeat Worm Tail and obtain 1 Scaled Stem to find out.

desc_zh: 奶奶發現森靈其實是迷惑人心的妖物，於是委託你消滅森靈。森靈可以在斐揚東邊森林中找到。
desc_en:
Hunt Worm Tail
After realizing that Worm Tail is a creature meant to confuse people, Grandmother asks you to defeat it. Worm Tail can be found in the eastern forest of Payon.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚的擔心的奶奶領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from the worried Grandmother in Payon.

desc_zh: 斐揚的爺爺說在東邊森林裡看到了奇怪的蘑菇。他說那東西肯定是怪物，委託你消滅名叫「魔菇」的蘑菇。
desc_en:
Hunt Spore
The Grandpa of Payon says he saw suspicious mushrooms in the eastern forest. Certain they are monsters, he asks you to defeat the mushrooms known as Spore.

desc_zh: 斐揚的爺爺好像被魔菇的繁殖力嚇了一大跳。要求你在東邊森林被完全覆蓋前消滅魔菇。前往獵殺蘑菇吧！
desc_en: The Grandpa of Payon is alarmed by how quickly Spore multiply. Defeat them before the eastern forest is overrun. Hunt Spore!

title_zh: 在蘑菇鋪天蓋地之前。-等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過斐揚的擔心的爺爺領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from the worried Grandpa in Payon.

desc_zh: 結果幫阿佑砍樹了。總之，去找在等待消息的阿佑父親談話吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Anxious Man
You ended up gathering firewood in Dongdong’s place. Go tell the news to Dongdong’s Father, who has been waiting anxiously.
objective_en: Conversation with an anxious middle-aged man

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆主城的地下監獄中，死去的囚犯吸收黑暗氣息後，變成了喪屍重獲新生，現在正在大步向前邁進。祭司卡隆面對不斷湧現的腐屍已經疲憊不堪，只好委託你消滅邪骸戰俘和腐屍戰俘。
desc_en:
Defeat Skel Prisoner and Zombie Prisoner
In the underground prison of Glast Heim Castle, prisoners long dead have risen as undead under a dark influence. Exhausted from facing endless waves of Zombie, the priest Charon asks you to defeat Skel Prisoners and Zombie Prisoners.
objective_zh: 消滅邪骸戰俘、腐屍戰俘
objective_en: Destroy the Evil Skeleton Prisoners and the Rotten Prisoners of War

title_zh: 夢想著逃獄的囚犯-等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過克雷斯特漢姆的卡隆領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from Charon in Glast Heim.

desc_zh: 克雷斯特漢姆地下監獄中，魔族們趁亂暗中逃出，在外昂首闊步。來幫助卡隆的納迪爾試圖孤軍奮戰，但看來心有餘而力不足。納迪爾拜託你幫忙消滅瑞比歐。
desc_en:
Defeat Rybio
In the underground prison of Glast Heim, demons have begun roaming about, taking advantage of the chaos of Confusion. Despite Charon’s help, Nadir could not handle them alone. Nadir asks you to defeat Rybio.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過克雷斯特漢姆的納迪爾領取任務。
desc_en: Quest available from Nadir in Glast Heim.

desc_zh: 克雷斯特漢姆地下監獄中，魔族們趁亂暗中逃出，在外昂首闊步。來幫助卡隆的納迪爾試圖孤軍奮戰，但看來心有餘而力不足。納迪爾拜託你幫忙消滅邪惡使者。
desc_en:
Defeat Injustice
In the underground prison of Glast Heim, demons have begun roaming about, taking advantage of the chaos of Confusion. Despite Charon’s help, Nadir could not handle them alone. Nadir asks you to defeat Injustice.

desc_zh: 斐揚青年學士的喜好好像有點奇怪，但以後還會常常見到面。
desc_en: The preferences of the Young Scholar in Payon seem rather unusual, but you may be seeing him often.

desc_zh: 和村民們締結了新的良緣！
desc_en: You have formed new connections with the townsfolk!

desc_zh: 吉芬塔和伊甸園正在聯合進行討伐地下密穴怪物大作戰。去吉芬地下密穴1樓消滅赤蒼蠅，展現自己的實力吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Hunter Fly
In cooperation with the Paradise Group, a monster suppression operation is underway in the underground dungeons of Geffen Tower. Head to Dungeon Floor 1 beneath Geffen and defeat ten Hunter Fly to prove your skills.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過吉芬的基層魔法師領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Quest available from Junior Mage in Geffen.

desc_zh: 吉芬塔地下的怪物每天都在不斷增殖，今天也去吉芬地下密穴1樓消滅赤蒼蠅吧。
desc_en: Monsters continue to multiply daily beneath Geffen Tower. Today as well, head to Dungeon Floor 1 under Geffen and defeat ten Hunter Fly.

title_zh: 擊殺綠腐屍和南瓜先生
desc_zh: 吉芬塔和伊甸園正在聯合進行討伐地下密穴怪物大作戰。去吉芬地下密穴2樓消滅綠腐屍和南瓜先生各10隻吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Ghoul and 10 Jack
In cooperation with the Paradise Group, a monster suppression operation is underway in the underground dungeons of Geffen Tower. Head down to Dungeon Floor 2 beneath Geffen and defeat ten Ghoul and ten Jack.
objective_zh: 消滅綠腐屍和南瓜先生各10隻
objective_en: Kill 10 green wights and 10 Mr. Pumpkins each
chain: 擊殺綠腐屍和南瓜先生
chain_en: Kill the Green Rotten and Mr. Pumpkin

title_zh: 擊殺綠腐屍和南瓜先生-等候
desc_en: Quest available from Junior Mage in Geffen.
chain: 擊殺綠腐屍和南瓜先生
chain_en: Kill the Green Rotten and Mr. Pumpkin

title_zh: 今天也擊殺綠腐屍和南瓜先生
title_en: Hunt Ghoul and Jack Again Today
desc_zh: 吉芬塔地下的怪物每天都在不斷增殖，今天也去吉芬地下 密穴2樓消滅綠腐屍和南瓜先生吧。
desc_en: Monsters continue to multiply daily beneath Geffen Tower. Today as well, head down to Dungeon Floor 2 beneath Geffen and defeat ten Ghoul and ten Jack.

title_zh: 擊殺傀儡娃娃和小惡魔
desc_zh: 去消滅生活在吉芬塔地下密穴3樓的傀儡娃娃和小惡魔各10隻吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Marionette and 10 Deviruchi
Head to Dungeon Floor 3 beneath Geffen Tower and defeat ten Marionette and ten Deviruchi.
objective_zh: 消滅傀儡娃娃、小惡魔各10隻
objective_en: Kill 10 puppets and 10 little devils each
chain: 擊殺傀儡娃娃和小惡魔
chain_en: Kill the puppet and the little devil

title_zh: 擊殺傀儡娃娃和小惡魔-等候
chain: 擊殺傀儡娃娃和小惡魔
chain_en: Kill the puppet and the little devil

title_zh: 今天也擊殺傀儡娃娃和小惡魔
title_en: Hunt Marionette and Deviruchi Again Today
desc_zh: 吉芬塔地下的怪物每天都在不斷增殖，今天也去吉芬地下 密穴3樓消滅傀儡娃娃和小惡魔各10隻吧。
desc_en: Monsters continue to multiply daily beneath Geffen Tower. Today as well, head to Dungeon Floor 3 and defeat ten Marionette and ten Deviruchi.

title_en: The Horse That Runs Through Nightmares
desc_zh: 某位男子主張吉芬塔地下密穴的夢魘導致自己天天做惡夢，夜不能寐。雖然半信半疑，但還是去捕捉夢魘10隻吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Nightmare
Man claims he cannot sleep because Nightmare roam the underground dungeon of Geffen Tower. It does not sound very Faith-inspiring, but defeat ten Nightmare anyway.

title_en: [Waiting] The Horse That Runs Through Nightmares
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過吉芬的疲憊男生領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Quest available from Tired Man in Geffen.

title_zh: 今天也是惡夢中奔跑的馬
title_en: The Horse That Runs Through Nightmares Again Today
desc_zh: 男子說自己今天又做了惡夢，要求再去收拾夢魘。這真的是夢魘造成的問題嗎？總之只好再去消滅夢魘10隻吧。
desc_en: Man claims he had nightmares again and asks you to hunt Nightmare once more. Are Nightmare truly to blame? Either way, defeat ten Nightmare again.

desc_zh: 柏堤少年說畢帝特太兇猛根本無法靠近，請求你幫忙帶溫馴的畢帝特給他。去畢帝特飛龍棲息地碰一碰畢帝特，如果沒有攻擊性就帶回來吧。如果有攻擊性就跟牠一決高下！
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Petite (Flying)
Little Petite Boy says Petite are too violent to approach and asks you to find a gentle one instead. Head to the Petite (Flying) Habitat, try greeting Petite, and bring back one that does not attack. If it attacks, you will have to fight!

title_zh: 畢帝特飛龍卡哇伊-等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過吉芬的柏堤少年領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Quest available from Little Petite Boy in Geffen.

title_zh: 今天也是畢帝特飛龍卡哇伊
desc_zh: 今天也去親近畢帝特飛龍，跟牠們打招呼吧。有會回應的畢帝特就帶回來，如果有攻擊性就跟牠一決高下！
desc_en: Today as well, approach Petite (Flying) and try greeting them. Bring back a Petite that greets you back, but fight if it attacks!

desc_zh: 柏堤少年說畢帝特地龍也不錯，請求你去 畢帝特地龍棲息地帶沒有攻擊性的畢帝特地龍給他。為了找到沒有攻擊性的畢帝特，到底要打多少隻有攻擊性的畢帝特呢？
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Petite (Ground)
Saying Petite (Ground) are fine too, Little Petite Boy asks you to head to the Petite (Ground) Habitat and bring back a Petite that does not attack. To find one, you may have to fight several Petite.

title_zh: 畢帝特地龍卡哇伊-等候
今天也是畢帝特地龍卡哇伊
desc_zh: 今天也去親近 畢帝特地龍，跟牠們打招呼吧。有會回應的畢帝特就帶回來，如果有攻擊性就跟牠一決高下！
desc_en: Today as well, approach Petite (Ground) and try greeting them. Bring back a Petite that greets you back, but fight if it attacks!

desc_zh: 凱依被騙進危險的失事輪，去失事輪救出凱依後，為免陷入險境，再消滅邪骸海盜10隻。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Pirate Skel
Kale was lured into the dangerous Shipwreck. Head to Shipwreck, rescue Kale, and defeat ten Pirate Skel to keep him out of danger.

title_en: [Waiting] Keep an Eye on a Friend
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過艾爾貝塔的蒂莫西領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Quest available from Timothee in Alberta.

desc_zh: 為了凱依，在失事輪上消滅邪骸海盜20隻，並帶著凱依回來。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Pirate Skel
For Kale, head to Shipwreck, defeat twenty Pirate Skel, and bring him back safely.

desc_zh: 為人擔心是好事，但過度擔憂反而適得其反。總之去找艾爾貝塔碼頭的蒂莫西，告訴他一切平安無事吧。
desc_en:
Go to Timothee
Caring is good, but too much worry can be harmful. Head to Timothee at the Alberta docks and let him know that everything is fine.

desc_zh: 就這樣讓蒂莫西和凱依去找准它企劃公司宣傳人員的話，可能會發生拳打腳踢的事件。乾脆親自跑一趟吧。
desc_en:
Go to the Zonda Agency Promoter Mulberry
If we let Timothee and Kale go to the Zonda Agency Promoter like this, it might end in a fistfight. It would be better to go and meet them directly.
objective_zh: 去找准它企劃公司宣傳人員某伯莉
objective_en: Go find the publicist of Zhuiti Planning Company, certain Burley.

desc_zh: 遺留在失事輪上的寶物說不定已經被庫克雷吃掉了。捕捉庫克雷10隻，直接確認一下吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Kukre
Perhaps Kukre have eaten the treasure left behind in the Shipwreck. Defeat ten Kukre and find out for yourself.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過艾爾貝塔的准它 宣傳人員領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Quest available from Zonda Promoter in Alberta.

title_zh: 今天也抽取庫克雷之肝
desc_zh: 為了尋找可能被失事輪上的庫克雷吃掉的寶物，今天也要捕捉庫雷克。
desc_en: Once again today, we hunt Kukre in Shipwreck in search of treasure they might have eaten.

title_en: Economic Logic of Creating What’s Missing
desc_zh: 為了鼓勵人們去尋找失事輪，決定直接把寶物藏在失事輪裡。雖然要說是寶物有點太微不足道，但總比沒有好吧。
desc_en:
Hide 10 Old Coin in the Shipwreck
To motivate those searching the Shipwreck, we decided to hide some treasure inside ourselves. It may be trivial, but it is better than having nothing.
objective_zh: 在失事輪藏古董硬幣10個
objective_en: 10 antique coins hidden in wrecked wheel
chain_en: Economic logic created out of nothing

title_zh: 無中生有的經濟邏輯-等候
title_en: [Waiting] Economic Logic of Creating What’s Missing
chain_en: Economic logic created out of nothing

title_zh: 今天也是無中生有的經濟邏輯
title_en: Economic Logic of Creating What’s Missing Again Today
desc_zh: 今天也在失事輪上藏古董硬幣，鼓勵冒險家們去找失事輪吧。
desc_en: Once again today, hide Old Coin inside the Shipwreck to give adventurers a reason to explore.

desc_zh: 為了釐清在藏硬幣時聽到的聲音，去找失事輪研究員吧。
desc_en:
Go to Aspa, the Sunken Ship Researcher
To explain what you overheard while hiding the coins, head to Sunken Ship Researcher.
objective_zh: 去找失事輪研究員艾斯帕

desc_zh: 為了對失事輪又愛又怕的膽小鬼艾斯帕，親自進入失事輪，有看到顯眼的可疑的物品就帶給他吧。
desc_en:
Find a Suspicious Item in the Shipwreck
Aspa loves the Shipwreck, but is too weak to enter it. Head inside the Shipwreck yourself and bring back any noticeable Suspicious Item you find.
objective_zh: 去失事輪尋找可疑的物品
objective_en: Go to the Wrecked Wheel to look for suspicious items

desc_zh: 已經大概掌握了失事輪的來歷，去告訴准它企劃公司宣傳人員這個消息吧
desc_en: Now that you have learned more about the true nature of the Shipwreck, report this information to the Zonda Agency Promoter.

desc_zh: 明明和海盜之王幽靈約好了，某伯莉卻說自己很忙推遲到明天。明天再來找艾爾貝塔的准它宣傳人員吧。
desc_en: After hastily making a promise with the Drake Spirit, Mulberry postponed it until tomorrow, saying he was busy. Come back tomorrow to visit the Zonda Promoter in Alberta.

title_en: Cleaning Sunken Ship Floor 1 Again Today
desc_zh: 為了遵守和海盜之王幽靈的約定，去失事輪1樓打怪物，並收集死人遺骨10個、昆蟲外殼5個、觸鬚5個吧。
desc_en:
Defeat Hydra and Collect Miscellaneous Items
To keep your promise with the Drake Spirit, defeat monsters on Sunken Ship Floor 1 and collect 10 Bone Fragment, 5 Insect Carapace, and 5 Tentacles.

title_en: Cleaning Sunken Ship Floor 2 Again Today
desc_zh: 為了遵守和海盜之王幽靈的約定，去失事輪2樓打怪物吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Whisper and Swift Pirate Skel
To keep your promise with the Drake Spirit, defeat the monsters on Sunken Ship Floor 2.
objective_zh: 消滅白幽靈10隻、消滅迅捷邪骸海盜
objective_en: Kill 10 White Ghosts and the Swift Evil Skeleton Pirates

desc_zh: 反正找到失蹤騎士的機會渺茫，不如去龜島稍微獵捕一下刺尾蜻蜓和彈簧兔後，再去向騎士提伯特報告吧。
desc_en: Anyway, the chance of finding the missing knight is slim, so why not go to Turtle Island to hunt for spiny-tailed dragonflies and spring rabbits, and then report to Knight Tybalt.
objective_zh: 消滅刺尾蜻蜓、彈簧兔各10隻
objective_en: Kill 10 spiny-tailed dragonflies and 10 spring rabbits each

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過艾爾貝塔的騎士提伯特領取任務。
desc_en: This task is a daily task, and you can re-acquire and perform the task after the waiting time. The quest can be obtained through Knight Tybalt of Alberta.

title_en: Today is also a trip to Turtle Island
desc_zh: 為了龜島的第2騎士團獵捕刺尾蜻蜓和彈簧兔各10隻後，去向騎士提伯特報告吧。
desc_en: After hunting 10 spiny-tailed dragonflies and 10 spring rabbits for the 2nd Knights of Turtle Island, report to Knight Tybalt.

desc_zh: 報告指出在龜島密穴內發現了人的蹤跡。為避免探查密穴的人們陷入險境，獵捕岩石龜和果樹龜後，向騎士提伯特報告吧。
desc_en: The report pointed out that human traces were found in the secret cave on Turtle Island. To prevent people exploring the secret cave from being put in danger, report to Knight Tybalt after hunting rock turtles and fruit tree turtles.
objective_zh: 消滅岩石龜、果樹龜各10隻
objective_en: Kill 10 rock turtles and 10 fruit tree turtles each

title_en: Today I also killed turtle group 1
desc_zh: 為了避免龜島密穴的第2騎士團陷入險境，獵捕岩石龜和果樹龜後，去向騎士提伯特報告吧。
desc_en: In order to prevent the 2nd Knights in the Turtle Island Secret Cave from being put into danger, hunt down the rock turtles and fruit tree turtles and report to Knight Tybalt.

desc_zh: 報告指出在龜島密穴內發現了人的蹤跡。為避免探查密穴的人們陷入險境，獵捕水靈龜和火焰龜後，向騎士提伯特報告吧。
desc_en: The report pointed out that human traces were found in the secret cave on Turtle Island. To prevent people exploring the secret cave from being put in danger, report to Knight Tybalt after hunting the water turtles and flame turtles.
objective_zh: 消滅水靈龜、火焰龜各10隻
objective_en: Kill 10 water turtles and 10 flame turtles each

title_en: Today I also killed the Turtle Group 2
desc_zh: 為了避免龜島密穴的第2騎士團陷入險境，獵捕水靈龜和火焰龜後，去向騎士提伯特報告吧。
desc_en: In order to prevent the 2nd Knights in the Turtle Island Secret Cave from being put into danger, hunt down the Water Turtle and the Flame Turtle, and then report to Knight Tybalt.

title_zh: 尋找龜島密穴失蹤兒童
title_en: Searching for missing children in Turtle Island secret cave
desc_zh: 不管怎麼說，都覺得龜島密穴內好像有人。進入密穴，盡可能找群體中位階最高的人談一談吧。
desc_en: No matter what, I feel like there is someone in the secret cave of Turtle Island. Enter the secret cave and try to talk to the highest-ranking person in the group.
objective_zh: 和在龜島失蹤的騎士團長對話
objective_en: Talk to the missing knight leader on Turtle Island

desc_zh: 為了協助探查，在龜島密穴內消滅風靈龜10隻之後，回去找騎士團長吧。
desc_en: In order to assist in the investigation, after killing 10 wind turtles in the secret cave of Turtle Island, go back to find the knight leader.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過良龜村的騎士團長領取任務。
desc_en: This task is a daily task, and you can re-acquire and perform the task after the waiting time. Quests can be obtained through the knight leader of Lianggui Village.

title_en: Today I also killed the Wind Turtle
desc_zh: 為了協助探查，今天也在龜島密穴內消滅風靈龜10隻之後，回去找騎士團長吧。
desc_en: In order to assist in the investigation, today, after killing 10 wind turtles in the secret cave of Turtle Island, go back to find the knight leader.

desc_zh: 回去找騎士提伯特，將騎士團長堅定的決心傳達給他吧。
desc_en: Go back to Knight Tybalt and convey the knight leader's firm determination to him.

desc_zh: 在失事輪上藏古董硬幣吧。
desc_en:
Hide Old Coin in the Shipwreck
Hide Old Coin inside the Shipwreck.
objective_en: Antique coins hidden in wrecked wheel

title_zh: 把古董硬幣全部藏起來

desc_zh: 已在村子執行了擊殺赤蒼蠅的委託，等候時間過後可透過吉芬的基層魔法師領取任務。
desc_en: You have completed the town’s request to hunt Hunter Fly. After the waiting time resets, the quest can be accepted again from Junior Mage in Geffen.

title_zh: 已在村子執行了擊殺綠腐屍和南瓜先生的委託，等候時間過後可透過吉芬的基層魔法師領取任務。
title_en: You have completed the town’s request to hunt Ghoul and Jack. After the waiting time resets, the quest can be accepted again from Junior Mage in Geffen.

title_zh: 已在村子執行了擊殺傀儡娃娃和小惡魔的委託。等候時間過後可透過吉芬的基層魔法師領取任務。
title_en: You have completed the town’s request to hunt Marionette and Deviruchi. After the waiting time resets, the quest can be accepted again from Junior Mage in Geffen.

title_zh: 已在村子執行了擊殺庫克雷的委託。等候時間過後可透過艾爾貝塔的准它宣傳人員領取任務。
title_en: You have completed the town’s request to hunt Kukre. After the waiting time resets, the quest can be accepted again from Zonda Promoter in Alberta.

title_zh: 已在村子執行了擊殺刺尾蜻蜓和彈簧兔的委託。等候時間過後可透過艾爾貝塔的騎士提伯特領取任務。
title_en: You have completed the town’s request to hunt [Dragon Tail] and Spring Rabbits. After the waiting time resets, the quest can be accepted again from Knight Tibalt in Alberta.

title_zh: 已在村子執行了擊殺龜群的委託。等候時間過後可透過艾爾貝塔的騎士提伯特領取任務。
title_en: You have completed the town’s request to hunt the Turtle Horde. After the waiting time resets, the quest can be accepted again from Knight Tibalt in Alberta.

title_zh: 已在村子執行了擊殺畢帝特飛龍的委託，等候時間過後可透過吉芬的柏堤少年領取任務。
title_en: You have completed the town’s request to hunt Flying Petite. After the waiting time resets, the quest can be accepted again from Little Petite Boy in Geffen.

desc_zh: 在夢羅克遇見的老學者說自己的弟子找刺客公會就一走了之，請幫忙找到他的弟子。前往刺客公會所在的夢羅克東南邊沙漠吧。
desc_en:
Talk to the Apprentice
The Old Scholar you met in Morroc asks you to find his apprentice, who wandered off alone in search of the Assassin Guild. Look for the apprentice Apprentice in the southeastern desert of Morroc, where the Assassin Guild is said to be.

desc_zh: 在沙漠內部區域找到了老學者的弟子，他表示自己受到泥人妨礙，無法前進，拜託消滅東邊的泥人，並收集黃玉碎片5個。
desc_en:
Collect 5 Sand Fragments
The apprentice of the Old Scholar, found deep in the desert, says he cannot proceed because of the Sandman. Defeat the Sandman to the east and collect ^4D4DFF5 Sand Fragments^000000.

title_zh: 像是失蹤兒童又不是失蹤兒童的失蹤兒童般的你
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過在在夢羅克東邊沙漠徘徊的少年領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. This quest can be accepted from the wandering Boy in the eastern desert of Morroc.

title_zh: 吃了腰痛的苦頭後交出東西。
title_en: A Pain in the Back, a Deal Made
desc_zh: 老學者在夢羅克外圍的金字塔前綠洲委託你去金字塔地下幫忙找回被木乃伊犬叼走的野戰鏟。順便消滅木乃伊犬和米洛斯。
desc_en:
Collect 1 Field Shovel
At the oasis outside Morroc, in front of the pyramid, the Old Scholar asks you to retrieve the ^4D4DFFField Shovel^000000 stolen by Verit in the pyramid basement. Defeating Verit and Minorous along the way is unavoidable.

desc_zh: 來自在盜賊公會生活的魯米的委託。他表示棲息於公會地下的木乃伊犬和米洛斯讓公會成員十分不安，請幫忙消滅木乃伊犬和米洛斯。
desc_en: Request from Lumin, who lives in the Thief Guild. The Guildsman are troubled by Verit and Minorous lurking in the guild basement. Defeat Verit and Minorous.

title_en: You Can’t Live on Just One Night’s Sleep
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過夢羅克遺址廢墟的魯米領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. This quest can be accepted from Lumin in the Morroc Ruins.

title_zh: 迷宮那頭朋友們的行蹤-1
title_en: Beyond the Maze, Where My Friends Are - 1
desc_zh: 歐內斯特說自己和一起來做作業的朋友走散了。請進入金字塔替他向朋友們傳達消息。慢慢爬上金字塔看看吧。
desc_en:
Talk to the Maxim Leader
Honest says he got separated from his friends while heading out for an assignment together. Find his friends Friends who entered the pyramid, and deliver his message. Climb the pyramid carefully.
objective_en: Talk to team leader Ma Xin

title_en: Sweet Dreams with an Old Blue Box
desc_zh: 歐內斯特的朋友們相信亡者遺物就是神秘箱子。獵捕木乃伊並獲得遺物後再次確認一下吧…
desc_en:
Collect 1 Dead Man’s Relic
Friends of Honest believe that the Dead Man’s Relic is an Old Blue Box. Defeat Mummy, obtain the relic, and verify the truth.

title_zh: 迷宮那頭朋友們的行蹤-2
title_en: Beyond the Maze, Where My Friends Are - 2
desc_zh: 把組長馬心和朋友們的事情告訴在綠洲等待的歐內斯特吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Honest
Report what you learned about his friends to Honest, who is waiting at the oasis. Well done.

desc_zh: 歐內斯特表示，為了破解金字塔的祕密，需要做一些處理。請求消滅蛇女伊絲，並將蛇女伊絲擁有的奇特物品帶給他。
desc_en:
Collect 1 Old Heart Piece
To uncover the secrets of the pyramid, Honest says some preparation is needed. Defeat Isis and bring back the unusual item it carries.

desc_zh: 自從歐內斯特和老學者一起展開研究，收到的委託也變多了。這次為了調查金字塔和史芬克斯之間的關係，委託你去查看傑洛米和諾可伊並告訴他有什麼收穫…
desc_en: Honest has grown busier since beginning research with the Old Scholar. To investigate the connection between the pyramid and the Sphinx, he asks you to observe ^4D4DFFJerome and Requiem^000000 directly and report back.

desc_zh: 收到的委託是調查在史芬克斯上層出沒的馬爾杜克和帕莎納。尤其是馬爾杜克身上的研究資料，可以的話一定要想辦法拿到。
desc_en:
Collect 1 Old Papyrus
You are asked to investigate ^4D4DFFMarduk and Pasana^000000 that appear on the upper levels of the Sphinx. Be sure to retrieve any research-worthy item carried by Marduk.

desc_zh: 收到的委託是消滅妨礙探勘的蛇女伊絲。蛇女伊絲集中出現於金字塔2樓、4樓。
desc_en: To ensure a smooth investigation, you are asked to eliminate the troublesome Isis. Isis appears most frequently on Pyramid Floor 2.

title_zh: 消滅蛇女伊絲 等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過夢羅克遺址廢墟的歐內斯特領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. This quest can be accepted from Honest in the Morroc Ruins.

title_en: Eliminate the Workers of the Sphinx
desc_zh: 收到的委託是消滅妨礙史芬克斯內部調查的傑洛米和諾可伊。傑洛米和諾可伊主要在史芬克斯1樓、2樓出沒。
desc_en: You are asked to defeat Jerome and Requiem, who are hindering the investigation inside the Sphinx. They are most commonly found on the 1st and 2nd floors of the Sphinx.

title_zh: 消滅史芬克斯的工人 等候
title_en: Eliminate the Workers of the Sphinx (Pending)

title_zh: 似乎還需要更多馬爾杜克攜有的「神秘莎草紙」。另外也收到委託，請求順道消滅妨礙探勘的帕莎納。
desc_zh: 神秘莎草紙10
desc_en: It seems more 'Old Papyrus' carried by Marduk is needed. While you are at it, you are also asked to defeat Pasana to aid the investigation.

title_zh: 史芬克斯的祕密 等候

desc_zh: 無法放下對於藍色箱子的執念的組長馬心與其組員們委託消滅木乃伊10隻並取來亡者遺物1個。
desc_en: At the request of Maxim Leader and his party, who cannot let go of their hopes for a Blue Box, defeat ^4D4DFF10 Mummy and bring back 1 Dead Man’s Relic^000000.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過金字塔的組長馬心領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. This quest can be accepted from Maxim Leader inside the pyramid.

desc_zh: 為了更加熟練於承接他人的委託，接下了消滅蘇克拉特沙漠的大嘴鳥和摩卡 的委託。 教官豐特斯強調，互相幫忙才能成為真正的冒險家。
desc_en:
Defeat Peco Peco and Muka
To get used to taking requests from others, you accepted a subjugation request for Peco Peco and Muka in the Sograt Desert. Fontes Professor says that helping one another like this is how you truly become an adventurer.

desc_zh: 正式決定承接地區村民的委託。首先從之前接來當作練習的消滅大嘴鳥和摩卡的委託開始。在蘇克拉特沙漠收到的民間申訴千篇一律都是「太吵了」。
desc_en: You decided to start accepting requests from local residents in earnest. This time, it is another subjugation request for Peco Peco and Muka, mainly coming from the Sograt Desert. Everyone complains about the same thing—they are too noisy.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過依斯魯得島教官豐特斯領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. This quest can be accepted from Fontes Professor in Izlude.

desc_zh: 教官豐特斯拿來了訓練用的委託。委託內容是離開依斯魯得島，去西南邊普隆德拉原野消滅出沒的魔鍋蛋和重金屬蝗蟲。有了日前獵捕[摩卡]和[大嘴鳥]的經驗，馬上就會知道是鄰近的原野。
desc_en:
Defeat Magnolia and Metaller
A training request brought by Instructor Fontes. He asks you to leave Izlude and defeat Magnolia and Metaller found in the Southwest Prontera Field. If you have experience hunting Muka and Peco Peco, you will know that this field is nearby.
objective_zh: 消滅魔鍋蛋和重金屬蝗蟲
objective_en: Eliminate magic pot eggs and heavy metal locusts

desc_en: A training request brought by Instructor Fontes. He asks you to head out of Izlude and defeat Magnolia and Metaller found in the Southwest Prontera Field. If you have experience hunting Muka and Peco Peco, you will recognize this field as nearby.

desc_zh: 來柏伊亞嵐島進行調查的大學生陷入了困境，請求派遣能夠提供協助的人。從依斯魯得島港口搭船到柏伊亞嵐島後，去見大學生赫爾登吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Student Helden
A university student who came to Byalan Island for research seems to be in trouble and has requested help. Take a ship from the port of Izlude to Byalan Island, then meet Student Helden.

title_en: Biology Is All About Sample Collection
desc_zh: 大學生赫爾登表示自己需要生物學標本，但密穴太可怕了不敢進去。請求幫忙消滅在海盜地洞1樓出沒的水母和漂浮蟲，並取得消滅時可獲得的標本「單細胞」。
desc_en:
Collect 10 Amoeba
Student Helden needs biological samples but is too afraid to enter the dungeon. Hunt Marina and Plankton that mainly appear on Undersea Tunnel Floor 1 and collect the samples known as 'Amoeba'.
chain_en: The hardest thing about biology is sampling

title_zh: 生物學最難的是採樣-等候
title_en: [Waiting] Biology Is All About Sample Collection
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過柏伊亞嵐島大學生赫爾登領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. This quest can be accepted from Student Helden on Byalan Island.
chain_en: The hardest thing about biology is sampling

desc_zh: 赫爾登發出委託時，一旁的流浪商人聽說有人要進入依斯魯得島迷宮，便提出了委託。將消滅螃蟹可獲得的5個鉗子取來給他，他會提供謝禮。
desc_en:
Collect 5 Nipper
Knowing that Helden would enter the Izlude Dungeon, the nearby Homeless Dealer made a request as well. He offers a reward if you bring back 5 Nipper obtained by defeating Vadon.

title_en: Strike While the Iron Is Hot
desc_zh: 流浪商人表示自己用鉗子做的靈符一定會大賣，委託再找更多鉗子來。螃蟹主要出沒於依斯魯得島海盜地洞2樓。
desc_en: Homeless Dealer believes his claw-based tongs business will be a success and asks for more Nipper. Vadon mainly appear on Undersea Tunnel Floor 2 in Izlude.

title_en: [Waiting] Strike While the Iron Is Hot
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過柏伊亞嵐島流浪商人領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. This quest can be accepted from Homeless Dealer on Byalan Island.

desc_zh: 集體來調查的朱諾學生之一歐內斯特表示自己受了傷，獨自休息時一直沒有其他組員的消息，心裡很不安。前往依斯魯得島海盜洞穴3樓找組員和組長馬心，告訴他們歐內斯特的消息。
desc_en: One of the Yuno students on a group research trip, Honest, is worried. While resting due to an injury, he has not heard from the other members. Head to Izlude Dungeon Floor 3, find the team member and Maxim Leader, and deliver Honest's message.

desc_zh: 組員庫絲奇麗在洞穴內不好好調查，滿腦子只想著做菜。他說只要在洞穴裡找到某種食材，一定可以做出震撼味覺的料理。委託內容是消滅烏賊並取得墨汁。
desc_en:
Collect 10 Ink
Team member Kusequili seems more interested in cooking than research. He claims that securing just one ingredient in the dungeon will result in an incredible dish. Defeat Mars and collect Ink.

desc_zh: 組員崙達安卡拿徹底喝醉了，醉醺醺地不停說著他遇見的某個女人，不管怎麼聽都覺得那是人魚。委託內容是確認他見過的女人是否真的是人魚。消滅人魚並取得人魚之心作為證據給他看。
desc_en:
Collect 1 Mermaid Heart
Team member Nonda Ancana is completely drunk. He keeps talking about a woman he met while intoxicated, but it sounds exactly like Obeaune. Defeat Obeaune and bring back a Mermaid Heart as proof.

desc_zh: 庫絲奇麗和組員們請求將自製的青蛙蛋墨水湯轉交給組員歐內斯特，順便向他轉達「我們沒事！」
desc_en:
Deliver the Ink Soup to Honest
Deliver the frog egg ink soup made by Kusequili and the others to Honest and let him know they are doing fine.
objective_zh: 把墨水湯交給歐內斯特
objective_en: Give the ink soup to Ernest

desc_zh: 歐內斯特對於組員們輕浮的態度感到生氣，同時又為他們對自己的關懷而莫名感動。為了讓組員們能夠順利調查，他委託消滅海盜地洞4樓具有威脅性的異變魚和馬克。
desc_en:
Defeat Swordfish and Marc
Although frustrated by the others’ carefree behavior, Honest is touched by their thoughtfulness. To help them continue their research safely, he asks you to eliminate the dangerous Swordfish and Marc in Izlude Dungeon Floor 4.
objective_en: Destroy the mutant fish and Mark

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過依斯魯得島迷宮的歐內斯特領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Honest in Izlude Dungeon.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過依斯魯得島迷宮的庫絲奇麗領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Kusequili in Izlude Dungeon.

desc_zh: 組長馬心嚷嚷著自己在海盜地洞地下深處看到了海神波賽頓。告訴他那只是叫做海神和人魚士兵的怪物時，他要求要有證據證明那是怪物。去取得背鰭和人魚嘴巴給他看吧。
desc_en:
Collect 1 Dorsal Fin and 1 Ancient Fish Lips
Maxim Leader is making a fuss, claiming he saw the sea god Poseidon in the depths of the Undersea Dungeon. However, he was told it was actually the monsters Strouf and Merman. Bring back proof that they are monsters by showing a Dorsal Fin and Ancient Fish Lips.

desc_zh: 發現名叫海神的怪物不是海神波賽頓的組長馬心想去地下神殿看看，但認為表示那裡的海神和人魚士兵會嚴重妨礙調查，於是請求消滅。
desc_en:
Defeat Strouf and Merman
After realizing Strouf was not a sea god, Maxim Leader wants to explore the Underwater Shrine, but says Strouf and Merman keep getting in the way. He asks you to eliminate them.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過依斯魯得島迷宮的組長馬心領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Maxim Leader in Izlude Dungeon.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過依斯魯得島迷宮的崙達安卡拿領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Nonda Ancana in Izlude Dungeon.

desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外名叫保羅的少年詢問蜂兵是不是強不強，並表示要是很強的話想委託幫忙消滅。可能是因為蜜蜂們從意外翻倒的蜂箱中跑出來後野生化，變得充滿危險性，所以他被警告過不要在外面玩。消滅蜂兵，守護遊樂場吧。
desc_en:
Defeat Hornet
Outside the west gate of Prontera, a boy named Paul asks if you are strong enough to defeat a Hornet. Bees escaped from an overturned hive and turned into Wildflower, making the area dangerous. Defeat Hornet and keep the playground safe.

desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外，保羅的委託。他說南邊有巨大的搖滾蝗蟲棲息，那些傢伙不知道什麼時候開始逼近西邊原野，拜託守護西邊原野不受潛在的威脅侵犯。消滅普隆德拉西南原野的搖滾蝗蟲，讓他安心吧。
desc_en:
Defeat Rocker
Another request from Paul outside the west gate of Prontera. He warns that giant grasshoppers Rocker living to the south may invade the western fields at any time. Head to Southwest Prontera Field and defeat the Rocker to put his mind at ease.

desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外名叫安妮的少女的委託。他聽豪恩赫斯說可怕的騎士蝸牛很可能正在從西邊原野往普隆德拉逼近中。於是提出委託，請求阻止蝸牛騎士進犯。消滅蝸牛騎士，讓他安心吧。
desc_en:
Defeat Ambernite
Outside the west gate of Prontera, a girl named Ann asks for help. She says someone named Hohenhoh told her about a terrifying knight, Ambernite, possibly marching toward Prontera from the Western Field. Defeat Ambernite and reassure her.

title_zh: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–蜂兵
desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外，名叫保羅的少年詢問蜂兵是不是很強，並表示要是很強的話想委託幫忙消滅。可能是因為蜜蜂們從意外翻倒的蜂箱中跑出來後野生化，變得充滿危險性，所以他被警告過不要在外面玩。消滅蜂兵，守護遊樂場吧。
desc_en: Outside the west gate of Prontera, a boy named Paul asks if you are strong enough to defeat a Hornet. Bees escaped from an overturned hive and turned into Wildflower, making the area dangerous. Defeat Hornet and keep the playground safe.
chain: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–蜂兵

title_zh: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–搖滾蝗蟲
desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外保羅的委託。他說南邊有巨大的搖滾蝗蟲棲息，那些傢伙不知道什麼時候開始逼近西邊原野，拜託守護西邊原野不受潛在的威脅侵犯。消滅普隆德拉西南原野的搖滾蝗蟲，讓他安心吧。
desc_en: Another request from Paul outside the west gate of Prontera. Giant grasshoppers known as Rocker live just to the south, and he fears they may invade the western fields at any moment. Defeat the Rocker in Southwest Prontera Field to put him at ease.
chain: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–搖滾蝗蟲

desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外名叫安妮的少女的委託。他聽豪恩赫斯說可怕的騎士蝸牛很可能正在從西邊原野往普隆德拉逼近中。於是提出委託，請求阻止蝸牛騎士進犯。消滅蝸牛騎士，讓他安心吧。
desc_en: Outside the west gate of Prontera, a girl named Ann asks for help. She says a terrifying knight known as Ambernite, described by someone named Hohenhlohe, may be advancing toward Prontera from the Western Field. Defeat Ambernite and reassure her.

title_zh: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–蜂兵 等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過普隆德拉西門外的保羅領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Paul outside the west gate of Prontera at Paul.
chain: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–蜂兵

title_zh: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–搖滾蝗蟲 等候
chain: 遊樂場穩定化大作戰–搖滾蝗蟲

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過普隆德拉西門外的安妮領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Ann outside the west gate of Prontera at Ann.

title_zh: 定期討伐怪物合作公告
desc_zh: 普隆德拉騎士團為了預先防範獸人和哥布靈將活動領域擴張至普隆德拉鄰近地區，將進行定期討伐。
desc_en:
Talk to Chivalry Staff.
The Prontera Chivalry conducts ^4D4DFFregular subjugation missions^000000 to prevent ^4D4DFFOrcs and Goblin^000000 from expanding their territory into areas near Prontera.

desc_zh: 參與獸人討伐行動。討伐隊團長一聲令下：「把獸人戰士、獸人女戰士、獸人嬰兒一家一網打盡！」為了不負他的期待，將獸人剷除乾淨吧！
desc_en:
Defeat Orc Warrior, Orc Lady, and Orc Baby.
You joined the Orc subjugation. The Subjugation Master shouted boldly, "^4D4DFFLet’s wipe out the entire Orc Warrior, Orc Lady, and Orc Baby family!^000000" Rise to the challenge and eliminate them all!
objective_zh: 消滅獸人戰士、女戰士、嬰兒
objective_en: Destroy Orc Warriors, Female Warriors, and Babies
chain_en: Orcs-kill them all in one sweep!

title_zh: 獸人-一網打盡大作戰！-等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過獸人村討伐隊團長領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from the Subjugation Master in Orc Village.
chain_en: Orcs-kill them all in one sweep!
