desc_zh: 獸人地下洞窟裡，存在著完全變成喪屍的獸人腐屍和邪骸獸人。把不潔的獸人全都掃蕩乾淨吧。完成後向討伐隊團長報告！
desc_en:
Defeat Orc Zombie and Orc Skeleton.
In the underground tunnels beneath Orc Village, Orcs have risen as the undead Orc Zombie and Orc Skeleton. Wipe out these corrupted Orcs as well. Report back to the Subjugation Master.
objective_zh: 消滅阿修羅狂戰士、邪骸戰士
objective_en: Destroy Asura Berserkers and Evil Skeleton Warriors

desc_zh: 獸人地下洞窟2樓裡，存在著長年缺乏光照，又因過於貪心而扭曲變異的獸人「茲諾克」。去收拾這個貪婪的傢伙吧。完成後向討伐隊團長報告！
desc_en:
Defeat Zenorc
On the second floor of the underground tunnels beneath Orc Village, there lurks a mutated Orc known as "Zenorc", twisted by greed after never seeing sunlight. Defeat this greedy creature and report back to the Subjugation Master.

desc_zh: 哥布靈們在獸人村南方形成了小小的部落。討伐隊副團長表示哥布靈和獸人一樣，是必須防範其擴張領域的怪物，要求協助討伐哥布靈。
desc_en:
Defeat Axe Goblin and Flail Goblin
To the south of Orc Village, Goblin have formed small settlements. The Subjugation Submaster says they must be stopped from expanding their territory, just like the Orcs, and asks for your cooperation in subjugating the Goblin.
objective_zh: 消滅大斧哥布靈、鏈鎚哥布靈
objective_en: Kill the Axe Goblin and Hammer Goblin

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過獸人村南邊哥布靈部落的討伐隊副團長領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from the Subjugation Submaster at the Goblin settlement south of Orc Village.

desc_zh: 消滅榔頭哥布靈、短劍哥布靈
desc_en: Defeat Hammer Goblin and Dagger Goblin

desc_zh: 把從普隆德拉騎士團辦事員那邊收到的騎士團補給品交給身在獸人村的討伐隊團長。
desc_en:
Talk to Subjugation Master
Deliver the ^4D4DFFKnight Supply Box^000000 received from the Prontera Chivalry Staff to the Subjugation Master in Orc Village.
objective_en: Talk to the leader of the expedition team

desc_zh: 討伐隊團長分出在獸人村落會用到的份量後，委託把剩餘的補給品送給討伐隊副團長，他去位於獸人村落南方的哥布靈部落進行討伐。
desc_en:
Deliver the Knight Supply Box to the Submaster
After setting aside the supplies needed for Orc Village, the Subjugation Master asks you to deliver the remaining supplies to the Subjugation Submaster, who has gone south to the Goblin settlement to carry out subjugation.
objective_zh: 把騎士團補給品交給副團長
objective_en: Deliver the Knights' supplies to the deputy leader

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過普隆德拉騎士團前的辦事員領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from the Office Staff in front of the Prontera Chivalry.

desc_zh: 部分哥布靈已將活動領域擴張至 哥布靈部落東邊原野。討伐隊副團長表示必須阻止更多的擴張發生，並做出擊退哥布靈的指示。
desc_en:
Defeat Morning Star Goblin and Goblin Archer
Some Goblin have expanded their territory as far as the East Field of the Goblin Settlement. The Subjugation Submaster insists that further expansion must be stopped and orders the subjugation of the Goblin.
objective_zh: 消滅日星錘哥布靈和弓箭哥布靈
objective_en: Destroy the Sun-Star Hammer Goblin and the Bow-Arrow Goblin

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過位於獸人村南邊哥布靈部落東邊原野的討伐隊副團長領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from the Subjugation Submaster in the East Field of the Goblin Settlement south of Orc Village.

desc_zh: 普隆德拉大教堂的拉爾斯表示，祭司克勞德*為了進化克雷斯特漢姆古城修道院而前去修行，但卻杳無音信，讓自己非常擔心。
desc_en: Lars of the Prontera Cathedral is worried, as he has lost contact with the priest Claude, who set out on a purification mission to the Monastery of Glast Heim Castle.

desc_zh: 克勞德請求幫忙消滅修道院內部的不死惡靈和闇神官。如果遇到在內部淨化活動中的祭司，也可以接受他們一些的幫助。
desc_en:
Defeat Wraith and Evil Druid
Claude asks you to deal with the undead Wraith and Evil Druid inside Inside St. Capitolina Abbey. If you encounter priests conducting purification inside, they may offer brief assistance.
objective_en: Destroy evil spirits and dark priests

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過克雷斯特漢姆修道院前的克勞德領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Claude in front of the Glast Heim Monastery.

desc_zh: 原本長眠於修道院的地下公墓中的古代祭司甦醒過來，變成了喪屍。請消滅暗黑祭司，協助淨化修道院。
desc_en:
Defeat Dark Priest
The former priests interred in the Catacombs of the Monastery have risen as undead. Defeat the Dark Priest to aid in the purification of the Monastery.

desc_zh: 艾爾帕蘭鐘塔管理員賽樂丁的委託。請求消滅鐘塔1樓變成魔物的書飛行魔書和灰塵朽魔，協助把鐘塔清掃乾淨。
desc_en:
Defeat Rideword and Punk
A request from the Clock Tower Manager of Al De Baran, Serdin. He asks for help cleaning the tower by defeating the possessed books ^4D4DFFRideword^000000 and dust monsters ^4D4DFFPunk^000000 on Clock Tower 1F.
objective_en: Destroy the Flying Magic Book and the Dead Demon
chain_en: Clean the first floor of the clock tower

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過艾爾帕蘭的鐘塔管理員 賽樂丁領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from the Clock Tower Manager of Al De Baran, Serdin.
chain_en: Clean the first floor of the clock tower

desc_zh: 鐘塔中存在著活蹦亂跳的小鐘錶。鐘塔管理員賽樂丁表示無法原諒忘記自己本分的鐘錶，請求將其破壞掉。古鐘魔主要在鐘塔2樓出現。
desc_en:
Defeat Clock
Small clocks that move on their own roam the Clock Tower. The Clock Tower Manager, Serdin, says those that forget their purpose deserve no mercy and asks you to destroy them. Clock mainly appear on Clock Tower 2F.

desc_zh: 除了古鐘魔之外，鐘塔裡還有另一個會自己活動的鐘錶。委託消滅動不動就響起鬧鐘的鐘怪，這比古鐘魔還更讓人難以忍受。鐘怪主要在鐘塔3樓出現。
desc_en:
Defeat Alarm
There is another type of living clock besides Clock. More troublesome than the rest, Alarm constantly rings at all hours. You are asked to defeat them. Alarm mainly appear on Clock Tower 3F.

desc_zh: 艾爾帕蘭地下有個密穴，聽說與鐘塔相連通。從地下深處傳來的魔女笑聲讓賽樂丁生不如死。他表示鐘塔會變成這樣說不定都是魔女害的，於是委託將其消滅。
desc_en:
Defeat Bathory
There is a dungeon beneath Al De Baran connected to Clock Tower Basement. A witch’s laughter echoing from deep underground troubles Serdin. He suspects the witch is the cause of the Clock Tower’s plight and asks you to defeat her.

desc_zh: 收集研發新醬料所需的材料後，回去找芭比Q吧。請在東邊洞穴馬吾獵捕突變蛙10隻、青蛙蛋5個。
desc_en:
Gathering Ingredients for Barbe Q
Gather the ingredients needed to research a new sauce and return to Barbe Q. From East Cave Mao, defeat 10 Thara Frog and collect 5 Spawn.
objective_en: After collecting the materials, go to Barbie Q

title_zh: 向克魔島南部海邊的莎拉比詢問克森拉嫩葉的事。
desc_zh: 和莎拉比對話
desc_en: Ask Seravi on the southern coast of Comodo about Coceracera.

title_zh: 消滅邪骸食人魚10隻左右，有助於消除克拉森的毒性。 在東邊洞穴馬吾消滅邪骸食人魚後，回去找莎拉比吧。
desc_zh: 消滅邪骸食人魚
desc_en: Defeating around 10 Megalodon should help neutralize the toxins of Coceracera. Defeat them at East Cave Mao and return to Seravi.

title_zh: 找到了品質很好的克森拉嫩葉。已經事先送去給芭比Q了，現在直接回去找芭比Q吧
desc_zh: 和芭比Q對話
desc_en: You have obtained high-quality Coceracera. It was already sent ahead, so return to Barbe Q.

title_zh: 芭比Q表示沒收到克森拉嫩葉。去芭比Q的家看看吧。
desc_zh: 前往芭比Q的家
desc_en: Barbe Q says he never received Coceracera. Go to Barbe Q’s House to the east.

title_zh: 芭比Q的女兒芭妮Q竟然因為被朋友哄騙，把克森拉嫩葉塗在臉上，看起來狀態很不好。去找對克森拉嫩葉十分了解的莎拉比詢問有沒有解決方法吧。
title_en: Barbe Q’s daughter, Barne Q, was tricked by a friend into applying Coceracera to her face and looks unwell. Ask Seravi, who knows the most about Coceracera, for a solution.

title_zh: 據說使用海葵的觸鬚進行按摩可以改善狀態。 在東邊洞穴馬吾消滅海葵10隻後，將獲得的觸鬚5個帶去給芭妮Q吧。
desc_zh: 把觸鬚交給芭妮
desc_en: A massage using Hydra Tentacles should help her recover. Defeat 10 Hydra at East Cave Mao and bring 5 Tentacles to Barne Q.

title_zh: 芭比Q請求你帶著突變蛙粘糊的蹼10個到露營地去，說完就跑走了。
title_en: Bring the Webfeet to Barbe Q
desc_zh: 把蹼交給芭比Q
desc_en: Barbe Q tells you to bring 10 Sticky Webfoot from Thara Frog to the campsite, then runs off.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過芭比Q領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Barbe Q.

desc_zh: 芭比Q說要開發新的料理，幫忙去東邊洞穴馬吾捕捉突變蛙10隻，並取得粘糊的蹼10個回來吧。
desc_en: As Barbe Q experiments with a new dish, defeat 10 Thara Frog at East Cave Mao and collect 10 Sticky Webfoot for Barbe Q.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過芭妮Q領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Barne Q.

desc_zh: 把克森拉嫩葉塗在臉上的後遺症讓芭妮Q苦不堪言，幫他去東邊洞穴馬吾消滅海葵10隻後，將取得的觸鬚5個給帶去給他吧。
desc_en:
Give the Tentacles to Barne Q
Bring 5 Tentacles obtained by defeating 10 Hydra at East Cave Mao to Barne Q, who is suffering from the aftereffects of applying Coceracera.
objective_en: Give the tentacle to Bani Q

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過莎拉比領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Seravi.
chain_en: The boat will naturally go straight when it reaches the bridge.

desc_zh: 為了協助栽培克森拉嫩葉，在東邊洞穴馬吾中消滅邪骸食人魚10之後，回來找莎拉比。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Megalodon
To help cultivate Coceracera, defeat 10 Megalodon at East Cave Mao and return to Seravi.
chain_en: The boat will naturally go straight when it reaches the bridge.

desc_zh: 收到了來自克魔島的守望相助隊員的委託。去克克魔 海邊幫忙整治攻擊人群的海豹寶寶10隻、海獺10隻吧。
desc_en: Accept the request from Security Guard Member in Comodo. Defeat 10 Furseal and 10 Seeotter attacking people at Kokomo Beach.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過守望相助隊員領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Security Guard Member.

desc_zh: 在克魔島守望相助隊員提出請求，為了清空前往汶巴拉的道路，去北邊洞穴盧安達消滅鐘乳巨石怪10隻、三葉蟲5隻、邪惡摩艾5隻吧。
desc_en: At the request of Security Guard Member in Comodo, clear the path to Umbala by defeating 10 Stalactic Golem, 5 Tri Joint, and 5 Megalith at Northern Cave Luanda.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過守望相助隊員領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Security Guard Member.

desc_zh: 幫助正在調查巴不其卡森林和基乃依沼澤地狀態的探險家消滅綠變色龍15隻和鱷魚人10隻吧。
desc_en: Assist the Explorer studying the ecology of Papuchicha Forest and Zenhai Marsh by defeating 15 Grove and 10 Alligator.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過探險家領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Explorer.

title_zh: 親自去找委託人的話，最多可再獲得1次獎勵。
title_en: Visit the Client Directly to Receive an Additional Reward (Once Per Day).

desc_zh: 受達爾卡斯神父之託，去克雷斯特漢姆本城那邊看看吧。
desc_en: Accept Father Darquez’s request and head toward the main castle of Glast Heim.

title_zh: 受奇亞布之託，去克雷斯特漢姆騎士團那邊看看吧。
title_en: Accept Charb’s request and head toward the knight hall of Glast Heim.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆城狩獵可憐的卡拉特小丑30隻以慰藉亡靈，然後回去找達爾卡斯吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Carat
At Glast Heim Castle, defeat 30 pitiful jesters, Carat, to put their souls to rest, then return to Darquez.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過克雷斯特漢姆的達爾卡斯領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Darquez in Glast Heim.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆 地下洞窟獵捕捲甲蟲30隻，即使是小蟲子也要送牠們上西天。然後回去找達爾卡斯吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Arclouse
At Glast Heim Underground Cave, defeat 30 Arclouse, sending even these tiny creatures to the gods who watch over all life, then return to Darquez.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆 水道中教訓虎蜥人30隻並淨化後，再回去找達爾卡斯吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Anolian
At Glast Heim Sewers, defeat 30 Anolian» to cleanse them thoroughly, then return to Darquez.
chain_en: If you go to heaven alive
If you go to heaven alive

desc_en: At Glast Heim Sewers, defeat 30 Anolian to cleanse them thoroughly, then return to Darquez.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆 水道中不要疑惑史汀到底有沒有魂魄，總之先給30隻史汀一點小教訓，再回去找達爾卡斯吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Sting
At :Glast Heim Sewers, do not doubt whether Sting still have souls—simply crush 30 of them and return to Darquez.
At Glast Heim Sewers, do not doubt whether Sting still have souls—simply crush 30 of them and return to Darquez.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆 地下洞窟把狂暴米諾斯30隻往死裡打並淨化後，回去找達爾卡斯吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Majoruros
At :Glast Heim Underground Cave, thoroughly purge 30 «T:Majoruros» and return to Darquez.
chain_en: Delicious, no? is a poor soul

title_zh: 美味，不？是可憐的靈魂-等候
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Darquez in «T:Glast Heim».
chain_en: Delicious, no? is a poor soul

title_zh: 再次美味，不？是可憐的靈魂
desc_en: At Glast Heim Underground Cave, thoroughly purge 30 «T:Majoruros» and return to Darquez.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆騎士團獵殺幽靈劍士30隻，為奇亞布提供協助吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Raydric
At Glast Heim Chivalry, hunt 30 Raydric and assist Charb.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過克雷斯特漢姆的奇亞布領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Charb in Glast Heim.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆騎士團獵殺卡利斯格30隻，為奇亞布提供協助吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Khalitzburg
At «T:Glast Heim» Chivalry, hunt 30 Khalitzburg and assist Charb.

title_zh: 或許是耿直的靈魂-等候
再次或許是耿直的靈魂
desc_en: At Glast Heim Chivalry, hunt 30 Khalitzburg and assist Charb.

desc_zh: 克雷斯特漢姆城獵殺邪骸浪人30隻，為奇亞布提供協助吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 30 Wanderer
At Glast Heim Castle, hunt 30 Wanderer and assist Charb.

desc_zh: 在克雷斯特漢姆騎士團獵殺深淵騎士10隻，為奇亞布提供協助吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Knight of Abyss
At Glast Heim Chivalry, hunt 10 Knight of Abyss and assist Charb.
This is a daily quest and can be accepted again after the cooldown expires. Accept the quest from Charb in Glast Heim.`
At Glast Heim Chivalry, hunt 10 Knight of Abyss and assist :Charb.

desc_zh: 在斐揚遇到的魯米說雷諾去了水井後一直沒回來，拜託你去問水井附近的老爺爺有沒有看到魯米，並幫忙轉達自己因公會傳喚而離開的消息。
desc_en:
Talk to Grandpa by the Well
Lumin, whom you met in Payon, says Reno has not returned from the well. Ask Grandpa near the well if he has seen Reno, and relay Lumin’s circumstances as he departs due to a guild summons.
objective_zh: 和水井邊的老爺爺對話
objective_en: Talk to the old man by the well

title_en: A Time That Calls for Calm
desc_zh: 在斐揚洞穴內吃了不少苦頭的雷諾似乎正在村子一角享受片刻的寧靜。如果想和雷諾對話的話，就去找他吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Reno
After enduring hardships in the caves of Payon, Reno seems to be resting in a quiet corner of town. If you wish to speak with him, head to Reno.

desc_zh: 青蛙7世表示最近來這附近的旅客老是把蛋拿走當作紀念品，導致青蛙一族面臨滅族危機，於是委託你幫忙找回散落在各處的1x 青蛙蛋 100個。
desc_en: King Gagor VII says that travelers have been taking frog eggs as souvenirs, putting the frog tribe at risk of extinction. Recover 100 discarded [Frog Egg]908 left scattered around.

desc_zh: 青蛙7世說蛇把青蛙當成一種健康食品看待。拜託你幫忙消滅黑蛇50隻，以撫慰同胞們的鬱憤。
desc_en: According to King Gagor VII, frogs are considered a nutritious delicacy to snakes. Defeat 50 Sidewinder to quell the resentment of the frog tribe.

desc_zh: 青蛙7世雖然想把你的活躍表現寫入年代紀中，但沒有妥當的證據，所以很苦惱。他說幫忙找來1x 毒牙 100個，他就會負起責任把你寫入青蛙年代紀。
desc_en: King Gagor VII wishes to record your deeds in the Frog Chronicle but lacks proper proof. Bring him 100 [Poison Fang]937, and he will ensure your feat is recorded.

desc_zh: 據傳，過去青蛙3世所著的青蛙年代紀中有記載躲避蛇眼的祕術。幫忙取得50x 鱗片皮膚個，拿給青蛙7世吧。
desc_en: It is said that the Frog Chronicle written by King Gagor III contains a secret technique to evade the eyes of snakes. Deliver 50 [Scaled Skin]936 to King Gagor VII.

desc_zh: 青蛙7世說自己還沒有後代，所以很可惜沒辦法和你配對。最近同族數量增加，糧食不足，去幫忙抓艾吉歐蜈蚣50隻吧。
desc_en: King Gagor VII laments that he cannot yet find you a mate, as the growing population has led to a food shortage. Hunt 50 Argiope to help.

desc_zh: 斐揚的波立歐吉娜說只要拿來1x 旋轉眼鏡個、1x 鋼鐵 100個、手續費50000Zeny，就會幫忙製作1x 望遠鏡。
desc_en: Barriojuna in Payon says she will craft a Magnifier if you bring 1 [Spin Glasses]2243, 100 [Steel]999, and pay a fee of 50,000 Zeny.

desc_zh: 只要給動物犄角收藏家蔡露奇3x 惡魔角個，他就會把自己珍藏的1x 鹿角頭飾給你。
desc_en: If you bring 3 [Baphomet's Horn]923 to the animal horn collector Cherokee, he will give you his prized [Antlers]2284.

desc_zh: 依斯魯得島名叫達納的小朋友說，只要拿來1x 頭巾個、50x 鐵個、1x 受損的鑽石個，他就會給你1x 醫師髮箍作為交換。
desc_en: A child named Dana in Izlude will trade a [Doctor Band]2273 if you bring 1 [Bandana]2275, 50 [Iron]998, and 1 [Damaged Diamond]733.

desc_zh: 依斯魯得島名叫奧利的小朋友說，只要拿來1x 髮箍個、20x 玻璃珠個，他就會幫你製作1x 燈泡髮圈。
desc_en: A child named Olli in Izlude will craft a [Light Bulb Headband]5034 if you bring 1 [Headband]2210 and 20 [Glass Bead]746.

desc_zh: 依斯魯得島名叫列登的小朋友說，只要拿來1x 髮箍個、1x 幸運珠鏈個，他就會幫你製作1x 十字架髮圈。
desc_en: A child named Redon in Izlude will craft a [Cross Headband]5036 if you bring 1 [Headband]2210 and 1 [Rosary]2608.

desc_zh: 依斯魯得島名叫顧索的小朋友說，只要拿來1x 髮箍個、1x 藍色染料個，他就會幫你製作1x 條紋髮帶。
desc_en: A child named Guso in Izlude will craft a [Striped Headband]5049 if you bring 1 [Headband]2210 and 1 [Blue Dye]978.

desc_zh: 依斯魯得島名叫梨塔的小朋友說，只要拿來1x 方頭巾個、1x 藍色染料個，他就會給你1x 藍色髮帶作為交換。
desc_en: A child named Rita in Izlude will trade a [Blue Headband]5052 if you bring 1 [Hood]2211 and 1 [Blue Dye]978.

desc_zh: 戴狐狸假面的男子說自己需要999x 狐狸尾巴個，幫忙找來的話，他就給會把自己的1x 狐狸假面給你。
desc_en: Man with Fox Mask says he needs 999 [Fox Tail]1022. If you bring them to him, he will give you his [Fox Mask]5069.

desc_zh: 為了證明和鄭何義嘉之間的友情，需要有製作耳機的材料。準備鋼鐵40個、酒精1個、煤礦1個應該就夠了。
desc_en: To strengthen your friendship with Eric, you will need materials to make a pair of headphones. 40 Steel, 1 Alcohol, and 1 Coal should be enough.

desc_zh: 不知名的劍士要製作抗噪專用1x 耳罩。需要詛咒紅寶石1個、柔毛200個、耳機1個、5000Zeny。
desc_en: The unnamed Swordman can craft noise-blocking [Ear Muffs]2283. He requires 1 Cursed Ruby, 200 Soft Fur, 1 Headphones, and a fee of 5,000 zeny.

title_zh: 可以戴在頭上的停止標誌頭飾
title_en: A Stop Sign You Can Wear on Your Head
desc_zh: 金格海默委託你取來代替木炭的瑪哪樹枝50個和黑色染料1個，並表示報酬是1x 停止標誌頭飾。
desc_en: Jingleheimer asks you to bring 50 Wood Pieces to use instead of charcoal, along with 1 Black Dye. In return, he offers an [Stop Sign]2272.

title_zh: 不知道要用在哪裡的標誌
title_en: What Would You Even Use a Stop Sign For?
A Feathered Hat Full of Sentiment
desc_zh: 諾本特只要給他回憶帽1個和羽毛300個，他就會把自己的1x 羽毛帽給你。
desc_en: Norbert says he will part with his [Feather Bonnet]5018 if you bring him 1 Romantic Gent and 300 Bird Feather.

desc_zh: 夢羅克的有點奇怪的商人表示只要給他瑪哪樹枝120個和10000Zeny，即可製作[草帽]2280</ITEM的話。
desc_en: The slightly odd Merchant in Morroc says he can make a [Sakkat]2280 if you bring 120 Wood Piece and pay a crafting fee of 10,000 zeny.

title_en: Sing While Wearing an Opera Mask
desc_zh: 在普隆德拉遇見的怪人要求鋼鐵20個和哀唱草1個，以及手續費5000Zeny當作1x 舞會面具的代價。
desc_en: The Stranger you met in Prontera asks for 20 Steel, 1 Singing Plant, and a fee of 5,000 zeny in exchange for an [Opera Mask]2281.

title_en: Who Needs a Graduation Cap Anyway?
desc_zh: 卡律洛說，想要1x 學士帽的四角平安無事的話，就去找來1x 西納雷花 10個、1x 蘆薈 10個、1x 曼特花 10個。
desc_en: Krolla says that if you want the edges of a [Graduation Cap]5012 to be safe, you should bring 10 [Hinalle]703, 10 [Aloe]704, and 10 [Ment]708.

desc_zh: 艾爾帕蘭的帽子商人要求你收集1x 鐘塔守護者耳機所需的材料。請準備1x 王牌外卡個、1x 可愛的掃把 100個、1x 絢麗的珊瑚 100個、1x 獸人將軍徽章 100個、1x 亮晶晶圓殼 100個、10x 迷思力個。
desc_en:
Supplying Crafting Materials
The Hat Maker in Al De Baran says that if you need [Clock Tower Manager's Income]19333, you should gather the materials. Bring 1 [Jokers Wild]25505, 100 [Cute Broom]25506, 100 [Fancy Coral]25507, 100 [Orc General Token]25508, 100 [Shining Round Shell]25509, and 10 [Mithril]25430.

desc_zh: 艾爾帕蘭的帽子商人要求你收集1x 懷錶髮飾所需的材料。請準備1x 王牌外卡個、1x 可愛的掃把 100個、1x 絢麗的珊瑚 100個、1x 獸人將軍徽章 100個、1x 亮晶晶圓殼 100個、10x 迷思力個。
desc_en: The Hat Maker in Al De Baran says that if you need [Pocket Watch Headgear]19334, you should gather the materials. Bring 1 [Jokers Wild]25505, 100 [Cute Broom]25506, 100 [Fancy Coral]25507, 100 [Orc General Token]25508, 100 [Shining Round Shell]25509, and 10 [Mithril]25430.

desc_zh: 拜託幫忙尋找在礦山遺失的物品。安全帽1個和手提燈1個！！拜託了！- 迷你鍋
desc_en:
Safety Helmet 1, Lantern 1
Please help me find some items lost in the mine. Look around the Skel Worker area for 1 Safety Helmet and 1 Lantern! I’m counting on you! - Mini Pot

title_zh: 要做得和1x 礦坑安全帽做得一模一樣。需要鋼鐵25個、夢羅克有售的水晶鏡子1個。- 迷你鍋
desc_zh: 鋼鐵25、水晶鏡子1
desc_en: I want to make it just like a [Mining Helmet]5031. I’ll need 25 Steel and 1 Crystal Mirror sold in Morroc. - Mini Pot

desc_zh: 先找在村子裡住很久的人，他可能會知道普勒斯特的家在哪裡！！
desc_en:
Finding an Elder
First, let’s look for an Long-time Resident who might know where Forest’s house is.

title_zh: 大人們好像不太願意隨便透露別人的住址，乾脆問問看小朋友們怎麼樣？
desc_zh: 尋找小朋友
desc_en: The adults seem reluctant to tell us about someone else’s home. Why not ask the children instead?

title_zh: 往那裡走之後∼咕嚕嚕喝點水之後∼過去會出現一個大錘子掉下來的地方。砰砰就住在那旁邊的房子裡。
desc_zh: 砰砰的家
desc_en: Keep going along the road~ You’ll see a place where you gulp down some water~ Go a bit further and you’ll find a spot where a big hammer comes down. BamBam lives in the house next door.

title_zh: 真是執著。請拿來4件1x 韓服，那樣我就會回覆。- 普勒斯特
desc_zh: 韓服4
desc_en: You are quite persistent. Bring me just 4 [Maiden’s Hem]1049, and I will give you the answer. - Forest

title_zh: 現在請走吧，冒險家。普勒斯特也需要休息呀！到初次見面的地方再見吧！
desc_zh: 去找琵奇
desc_en: Let’s be on our way now, Adventurer. Forest needs his rest as well. Meet me again at the place where we first met!

desc_zh: 那隻小狗是要叫我們跟過去嗎？要去哪裡？那裡…？
desc_en:
Follow the Puppy
Is this puppy telling me to follow it? Where is it going? Over there… that way?

title_zh: 1x 香菇髮箍的材料都沒了。你能幫我找來嗎？50個香菇芽孢就可以做一個。- 帽子匠人
desc_zh: 香菇芽孢50
desc_en: We’re completely out of materials for the [Mushroom Headband]5082. Could you gather them as well? I can make one if you bring me 50 Mushroom Spore. - Hat Artisan

desc_zh: 負責受理事件的警衛兵在碼頭附近。請去找他詢問一下情況。
desc_en:
To Guard
The Guard who handled the case is near the harbor. Go and ask about the situation.

title_zh: 雖然向警衛兵詢問了事件的相關問題，但沒有什麼大收穫。再回去找[六神無主的商人]alberta,92,110,0,101,0吧。
desc_zh: 去找六神無主的商人
desc_en: I asked Guard about the incident, but it didn’t lead to anything useful. Let’s head back to Distracted Merchant.

title_zh: 請幫忙找來變身葉子50張和貓耳髮圈1個。我會以1x 貍貓帽作為謝禮。沒剩多少時間就要出航了！- 六神無主的商人
desc_zh: 補充遺失的物品
desc_en: Please bring me 50 Raccoon Leaf and 1 Cat Headband. As a token of my gratitude, I’ll give you a [Raccoon Hat]5033. We don’t have much time before departure! - Distracted Merchant

desc_zh: 想製作1x 鋼鐵面具的話，需要鋼鐵25個，你可以幫忙找來嗎？- 黃金手
desc_en:
25 Steel
To make a [Welding Mask]2292, I’ll need 25 Steel. Can you bring them to me? - Golden Hand

title_zh: 想製作堅固的1x 鋼鐵面具的話，需要再多找來鋼鐵25個，別忘了還要加上熱煤礦使用費2000Zeny。- 黃金手
desc_zh: 鋼鐵25、2000Zeny
desc_en: To craft a sturdier [Welding Mask]2292, I’ll need another 25 Steel. Don’t forget the 2,000 Zeny for the fuel cost. - Golden Hand

desc_zh: 你可以去看看藍的狀態如何嗎？要是他死了的話怎麼辦…？
desc_en:
To Ram
Could you go check on Ram for me? I’m worried… what if something happened?

title_zh: 我沒事，不過不要直接告訴姊姊，知道嗎？
desc_zh: 去找米海億
desc_en: I’m fine. But please don’t tell my sister there’s nothing wrong just like that, okay?

title_zh: 要貼1x OK繃之類的東西？那就需要腐爛繃帶50個和酒精1個才行。 米海億
desc_zh: 腐爛繃帶50、酒精1
desc_en: You want me to apply something like a [Bandage]5063? Then I’ll need 50 Rotten Bandage and 1 Alcohol. Michael

title_zh: 我要做一下準備，你可以先去找藍嗎？
title_en: I’ll get ready and head over, so could you go to Ram first?

title_zh: 請幫我跟姊姊好好解釋，好嗎？
desc_en: Please explain things well to my sister for me, okay?

title_zh: 製作時尚太陽眼鏡和愛心髮夾
title_en: Crafting Fashion Sunglasses and Heart Hairpin
desc_zh: 你有看到碼頭前那個把太陽眼鏡戴在頭上的男子嗎？請去問問他吧。
desc_en:
The Man Wearing Sunglasses
Do you see the man with Sunglasses resting on his head in front of the harbor? Please go ask him. That man

title_zh: 你有看到烤肉場附近的那個女子嗎？也去跟他聊一聊之後再來吧。
desc_zh: 正在跳舞的女子
desc_en: Do you see the woman near the barbecue area? Please talk to her as well and hear her story. That woman

title_zh: 聽完兩個人說的話了。回去找佩路並把內容轉達給他知道。
desc_zh: 去找佩路
desc_en: I’ve heard both of their stories. Let’s return to Pero and report back.

title_zh: 你對1x 時尚太陽眼鏡有興趣嗎？那請去找眼鏡頭飾1個和紅色染料1個來給我，我就會幫你製作。佩路
desc_zh: 眼鏡頭飾1、紅色染料1
desc_en: Interested in a [Fashion Sunglasses]5047? Bring me 1 Head Glasses and 1 Red Dye, and I’ll make it right away. - Pero

title_zh: 你對1x 愛心髮夾有興趣嗎？那請去找火靈原石1個和髮箍1個來給我，我就會幫你製作。佩路
desc_zh: 火靈原石1、髮箍1
desc_en: Interested in a [Heart Hairpin]5041? Bring me 1 Flame Heart and 1 Headband, and I’ll make it right away. - Pero

desc_zh: 我要製作1x 紅髮梳。只要有混合劑1個、紅色染料1個、堅硬外殼50個、斧1個就可以製作了。- 娜娜
desc_en:
Materials for Hair Brush
I need to make a [Hair Brush]5444. With 1 Mixture, 1 Red Dye, 50 Very Hard Shells, and 1 Axe, it should be possible. - Nana

desc_zh: 我想要製作1x 鬱金香髮夾。要是有笑臉面具1個和紅色染料就可以製作了！- 賽錐可
desc_en:
1 Smile Mask, 1 Red Dye
I was planning to make a [Tulip Hairpin]5077. With just 1 Smile Mask and 1 Red Dye, it can be done! - Cedric

desc_zh: 我要用裝飾用蛋殼帽1個和藍色染料1個、紅色染料1個、黃色染料1個來製作1x 藍白蛋殼帽。- 英華
desc_en:
Art Supplies
With 1 Decorative Eggshell, 1 Blue Dye, 1 Red Dye, and 1 Yellow Dye, I can make a [Colorful Eggshell]5039. - Yeonghwa

title_en: Crafting Chef’s Hat and Cake Hat
desc_zh: 請去問住在鐵軌附近的山姆要不要參加派對後再來找我。
desc_en:
To Sam
Please ask Sam, who lives near the railroad, whether he will attend the party.

title_zh: 請去問住在大樹附近的阿爾伯特要不要參加派對後再來找我。
desc_zh: 去找阿爾伯特
desc_en: Please ask Albert, who lives near the tree, whether he will attend the party.

title_zh: 已經詢問過山姆和阿爾伯特的意見，去告訴納黎吧。
desc_zh: 去找納黎
desc_en: Now that you’ve asked Sam and Albert, report back to Nari.

title_zh: 只要找來小蛋糕20個和白色染料1個、柔毛30個，我就用1x 廚師帽跟你交換。- 納黎
desc_zh: 廚師帽材料
desc_en: Bring 20 Cake Slice, 1 White Dye, and 30 Soft Fur, and I’ll exchange them for a [Chef’s Hat]5026. - Nari

title_zh: 只要找來小蛋糕20個和柺杖糖5個、烤得很棒的甜餅人15個、鋼鐵10個、糖果10個，我就用1x 蛋糕帽跟你交換。- 納黎
desc_zh: 蛋糕帽材料
desc_en: Bring 20 Cake Slices, 5 Candy Cane, 15 well-baked Cookie, 10 Steel, and 10 Candy, and I’ll exchange them for a [Cake Hat]5024. - Nari

desc_zh: 要是有火線頭飾1個和火柴1個的話，就可以製作1x 蠟燭頭飾了。- 英華
desc_en:
1 Wick, 1 Matchstick
With just 1 Wick and 1 Matchstick, you can make a [Candle]5028. - Movie

title_en: So You Can Attend the Ball
desc_zh: 請帶給馨德花葉1個、鋼鐵10個、20,000Zeny，以便製作[花卉髮夾]8027。
desc_en:
Crafting Flower Hairpin
Bring 1 Flower Petal, 10 Steel, and 20,000 Zeny so Cinder can make a [Flower Hairpin]8027.

desc_zh: 請帶給熱血傳教士小雞卡片1個、方頭巾1個、白色染料1個，以便製作[熱血髮圈]8028。
desc_en:
Crafting Fiery Headband
Bring 1 Picky Card, 1 Headband, and 1 White Dye to Hot-Blooded Evangelist to make a [Fiery Headband]8028.

title_en: The Secret of the Transforming Raccoon
desc_zh: 只要拿給拉努卡變身葉子10個，他就會幫你製作[變身樹葉]8029。
desc_en:
Crafting Transformation Leaf
If you give 10 Raccoon Leaf to Ranuka, they will craft a [Transformation Leaf]8029 for you.

desc_zh: 只要拿給塔紐烏腐臭之魚1個，腐爛鱗片30個，生魚片5個，和魚尾1個，他就會幫你製作 [進化的藍色魚]8030。
desc_en:
Crafting Blue Fish
If you give 1 Rotten Fish, 30 Rotten Scale, 5 Sliced Fish, and 1 Fish Tail to Tanyuu, they will craft a [Blue Fish]8030.

desc_zh: 拿穀物100個和強韌木藤條30個去給努梅羅吧。他會給你[遮陽帽]80321個作為交換。
desc_en:
Crafting Straw Hat
Bring 100 Grain and 30 Tough Vine to Numero. In return, you will receive 1 [Straw Hat]8032.

desc_zh: 只要拿給努梅羅遮陽帽1個、仙人掌刺50個、吉他1個，就可以得到[墨西哥帽]80331個。
desc_en:
Crafting Sombrero
Give 1 Straw Hat and 50 Cactus Needle to Numero to receive 1 [Sombrero]8033.

desc_zh: 請拿給特姆無邊帽1個、毛50個、羽毛50個、柔毛10個，以便他製作[毛帽]8034。
desc_en:
Crafting Fur Hat
Bring 1 Cap, 50 Soft Fluff, 50 Bird Feather, and 10 Soft Fur so that Teamin can craft a [Fur Hat]8034.

desc_zh: [花卉髮夾]8027的材料是花葉1個、鋼鐵10個、20,000Zeny。只要拿給馨德他就會幫忙製作髮夾，並附贈使用後剩餘的植物梗1個。
desc_en: The materials for [Flower Hairpin]8027 are 1 Flower Petal, 10 Steel, and 20,000 Zeny. Bring them to Cinder, and they will craft the hairpin and return 1 leftover Plant Stem.

desc_zh: 快拿給熱血傳教士小雞卡片1個、方頭巾1個、白色染料1個！這樣他才能製作[熱血髮圈]8028！
desc_en: Bring 1 Picky Card, 1 Headband, and 1 White Dye to Hot-Blooded Evangelist! I will make a [Fiery Headband]8028 for you!

desc_zh: 只要拿給拉努卡變身葉子10個，他就會幫你製作[變身樹葉]8029！
desc_en: Give 10 Raccoon Leaf to Ranuka, and I will make a [Transformation Leaf]8029 for you!

desc_zh: 請拿給塔紐烏腐臭之魚1個和腐爛鱗片30個、生魚片5個和魚尾1個， 就能得到[進化的藍色魚]8030。
desc_en: Give 1 Rotten Fish, 30 Rotten Scale, 5 Sliced Fish, and 1 Fish Tail to Tanyuu and take your [Blue Fish]8030.

desc_zh: 我是努梅羅。穀物100個、強韌木藤條30個。報酬是了不起的[遮陽帽]80321個。呵呵呵…
desc_en: This is Numero. 100 Grain and 30 Tough Vine. The reward is 1 fine [Straw Hat]8032. Hehehe...

title_zh: 努梅羅的墨西哥帽便條
desc_zh: 我是努梅羅。遮陽帽1個、仙人掌刺50個、吉他1個。我就幫你製作了不起的[墨西哥帽]8033。
desc_en: This is Numero. 1 Straw Hat and 50 Cactus Needle. I will craft a fine [Sombrero]8033 for you.

desc_zh: 特姆的[毛帽]8034配方：無邊帽1個、毛50個、羽毛50個、柔毛10個。
desc_en: Recipe for Teamin’s [Fur Hat]8034: 1 Cap, 50 Soft Fluff, 50 Bird Feather, 10 Soft Fur.

desc_zh: 你抓得到克瑞米和瓢蟲各10隻嗎？抓不到對吧？就算是大人也做不到啦！
desc_en:
10 Creamy, 10 Stainer
Can you defeat 10 Creamy and 10 Stainer? You can’t, right? Even adults couldn’t pull that off!

desc_zh: 可以幫我收集硬角10個947來嗎？
desc_en:
10 Hard Horn
Could you please gather 10 Hard Horn947?

desc_zh: 是黑蛇。求求你…先要眼前所見的5隻就好。
desc_en:
5 Sidewinder
It’s Sidewinder. Please… just about 5 of the ones you see will be enough.

title_zh: 妙勒尼：這種東西也算藥？
desc_zh: 噬人樹花10個1032和野豬毛5個1028。這些都是珍貴的藥材，帶來的路上要小心保管。
desc_en:
10 Man-Eater Blossom, 5 Boar Mane
10 Man-Eater Blossom1032 and 5 Boar Mane1028. These are all precious medicinal ingredients, so handle them with care.
objective_en: Man-Eating Tree Flower 10, Wild Boar Hair 5

title_zh: 妙勒尼：充滿香氣的嗚嗡
desc_zh: 請在堆肥中加入昆蟲硬殼2個7190和噬人樹花2個1032並好好翻攪。要是野豬沒有跑來的話，就一直加入並翻攪到有野豬來為止。
desc_en:
Dung Heap 01
Stir the Dung Heap thoroughly after placing 2 Hard Shell Back7190 and 2 Man-Eater Blossom1032 inside. If no Savage appears, keep adding the items and stirring until one shows up.

title_zh: 請在堆肥中加入昆蟲硬殼2個7190和噬人樹花2個1032並好好翻攪。要是野豬沒有跑來的話，就一直加入並翻攪到有野豬來為止。

chain: 請在堆肥中加入昆蟲硬殼2個7190和噬人樹花2個1032並好好翻攪。要是野豬沒有跑來的話，就一直加入並翻攪到有野豬來為止。
chain_en: Please add 2 insect hard shells 7190 and 2 man-eating tree flowers 1032 to the compost and stir it well. If the wild boar does not come, keep adding and stirring until the wild boar comes.

chain: 請在堆肥中加入昆蟲硬殼2個7190和噬人樹花2個1032並好好翻攪。要是野豬沒有跑來的話，就一直加入並翻攪到有野豬來為止。
chain_en: Please add 2 insect hard shells 7190 and 2 man-eating tree flowers 1032 to the compost and stir it well. If the wild boar does not come, keep adding and stirring until the wild boar comes.

chain: 請在堆肥中加入昆蟲硬殼2個7190和噬人樹花2個1032並好好翻攪。要是野豬沒有跑來的話，就一直加入並翻攪到有野豬來為止。
chain_en: Please add 2 insect hard shells 7190 and 2 man-eating tree flowers 1032 to the compost and stir it well. If the wild boar does not come, keep adding and stirring until the wild boar comes.

title_zh: 所有的堆肥都翻好了，回去找雷文吧。
desc_zh: 去找雷文
desc_en: All Dung Heap locations have been checked. Return to Leon.

desc_zh: 請檢查西邊的陷阱。
desc_en:
Western Trap
Inspect the Western Trap.

desc_zh: 東南邊的陷阱
desc_en: Inspect the Southeastern Trap.

desc_zh: 東北邊的陷阱
desc_en: Inspect the Northeastern Trap.

title_zh: 請幫忙抓住老是破壞陷阱的狸貓20隻。- 嘉列特
desc_zh: 狸貓20
desc_en: Defeat the ^0000CDSmokie^000000 that keep destroying the installed traps. Defeating ^0000CD20^000000 of them should be enough. - Gallet

title_en: Mjolnir: Just to Have More Fun
desc_zh: 小野豬給的動物外皮919又柔軟又好用，麻煩幫我找來動物外皮20張！！ - 南修
desc_en:
Animal Skin 20
The Animal Skin919 dropped by Savage Babe is said to be soft and easy to work with. Please bring me 20 Animal Skin! - Namsu

title_zh: 妙勒尼：前往無數的橋樑！
desc_zh: 請幫忙抓住老是破壞我寶貝的花朵的艾斯蜘蛛30隻。 -希德
desc_en:
Argos 30
Please defeat the ^0000CDArgos^000000 that keep ruining my precious flowers. Defeating ^0000CD30^000000 of them should be enough. - Hilde

desc_zh: 請至少和螳螂20隻對練一次，然後再來告訴我你有什麼體悟。 - 大刀螳
desc_en:
Mantis 20
Try sparring with at least ^0000CD20 Mantis^000000. Then come back and tell me what you have learned. - Beetle

title_en: Mjolnir: Way Too Many, Even for Me
desc_zh: 請幫忙捕捉不但腳很多、個體數量也很多的艾吉歐蜈蚣！這樣我們才畢得了業！30隻左右就好！- 蓋拉特伊
desc_en:
Argiope 30
Please defeat those many-legged, multi-headed ^0000CDArgiope^000000! Only then can we graduate! About ^0000CD30^000000 should do! - Galatei

desc_zh: 請帶給我獵蠅給的蛾蝶蟲翅膀粉末20個，請加油，我們的幫手！ 薛兒比
desc_en:
Moth Dust 20
Please bring me ^0000CD20 Moth Dust dropped by Dustiness^000000. You can do it, our trusty helper! - Selby

title_zh: 尼芙菲姆：南瓜，必須守護
desc_zh: 相逢既是有緣，請幫幫忙吧。幫忙擊退假面鬼和無顱武士各20隻。- 伏米契
desc_en: Since we are destined to meet each other, please help me. Help fight off 20 masked ghosts and 20 headless warriors each. - Fumich

desc_zh: 現在沒事了，請凌晨過後再來。伏米契
desc_en: It's okay now. Please come back after early morning. Fumich

title_zh: 今天也請幫忙掃蕩假面鬼和無顱武士各20隻。- 伏米契
title_en: Please help me clear out 20 masked ghosts and 20 headless warriors each today. - Fumich

desc_zh: 之後的部分，你去踩完影子再來找我，我就告訴你！是廣場的魔女圖中的影子！！
desc_en: For the next part, come to me after stepping on the shadow, and I will tell you! It’s the shadow in the picture of the witch in the square! !
objective_en: Stepping on the shadow of the square

title_zh: 踩了廣場的魔女圖上的影子。回去找休休，聽聽接下來的內容吧。
title_en: Stepped on the shadow on the witch picture in the square. Go back to Xiuxiu and listen to what follows.
desc_zh: 去找休休
desc_en: Go find Xiuxiu

title_zh: 請你去村子外的鬼峽谷掃蕩捕捉銀月魔女20隻、嗜血怪人20隻。千萬別被人察覺到，知道嗎？休休
title_en: Please go to the Ghost Canyon outside the village to sweep and capture 20 Silver Moon Witches and 20 Bloodthirsty Monsters. Don’t let anyone notice you, you know? rest rest
desc_zh: 銀月魔女20、嗜血怪人20
desc_en: Silver Moon Witch 20, Bloodthirsty Monster 20

desc_zh: 每天只能做一點，讓大家無法察覺。一次太多的話會被發現。所以請凌晨過後再來找我吧。休休
desc_en: You can only do a little bit every day so that no one can notice it. Too much at once and you'll get caught. So please come back to me after midnight. rest rest

desc_zh: 今天這樣就夠了。接下來請凌晨過後再來吧。- 蓋拉特伊
desc_en:
Waiting Period
That will be enough for today. Please come back after dawn has passed. - Galatei
Please defeat those those many-legged, multi-headed ^0000CDArgiope^000000! Only then can we graduate! About ^0000CD30^000000 should do! - Galatei

title_zh: 等候：收集蛾蝶蟲翅膀粉末
desc_zh: 就算我再怎麼為翅膀著迷，也沒辦法邊睡邊研究。請凌晨過後再來吧。- 薛兒比
desc_en: I may be obsessed with wings, but I still sleep before researching. Please come back after dawn. - Selby

title_zh: 今天也請你幫忙收集獵蠅給的蛾蝶蟲翅膀粉末20個。 薛兒比
title_en: So for today, please bring me ^0000CD20 Moth Dust dropped by Dustiness^000000. - Selby

desc_zh: 冒險家，請凌晨過後一定要再來。那時候師父應該已經不記得了。- 修練生們
desc_en: Adventurer, please be sure to come back after dawn. By then, the master will have forgotten everything. - Pupil

title_zh: 汶巴拉：普利內坦的煩惱
desc_zh: 普利內坦很擔心哥哥汶坡克利歐坦。去找汶坡克利歐坦吧。
desc_en:
Talk to Wombokoriotan
Prenetan is worried about his older brother, Wombokoriotan. Go and speak with Wombokoriotan.

title_zh: 汶巴拉：我美麗的新娘們
desc_zh: 去找據稱是汶坡克利歐坦的女朋友薇娜坦、貝爾慈坦、恰比瑪坦吧。
desc_en:
Talk to the Girlfriends
Visit all of Wombokoriotan’s girlfriends: Wenatan, Berztan, and Chabimatan.

title_zh: 汶巴拉：薇娜坦想要的東西
desc_zh: 薇娜坦請求幫忙獵捕狂暴野貓20隻，然後帶1x 賽依伐去普利內坦的家。和薇娜坦、貝爾慈坦恰比瑪坦所有人談過之後再去吧。
desc_en:
Deliver 5 Cyfar
Wenatan asks you to defeat 20 Wild Rose and bring [Cyfar]7053 to Prenetan’s house.
After speaking with Wenatan, Berztan, and Chabimatan, head there.

title_zh: 汶巴拉：貝爾慈坦想要的東西
desc_zh: 貝爾慈坦請求幫忙獵捕巧克猴20隻，並帶5x 香蕉個去 普利內坦的家。和薇娜坦、貝爾慈坦恰比瑪坦所有人談過之後再去吧。
desc_en:
Deliver 5 Banana
Berztan asks you to defeat 20 Choco and bring 5 [Banana]513 to Prenetan’s house. After speaking with Wenatan, Berztan, and Chabimatan, head there.

title_zh: 汶巴拉：恰比瑪坦想要的東西
desc_zh: 恰比瑪坦請求幫忙在卡拉拉沼澤獵捕苗娃佩瑞絲20隻，並帶5x 綠芽個去普利內坦的家。和薇娜坦、貝爾慈坦恰比瑪坦所有人談過之後再去吧。
desc_en:
Deliver 5 Sprout
Chabimatan asks you to defeat 20 Parasite in Kalala Swamp, then bring 5 [Sprout]7193 to Prenetan’s house. After speaking with Wenatan, Berztan, and Chabimatan, head there.

desc_zh: 前往普利內坦的家，聽聽三個女朋友想說什麼吧。
desc_en:
Visit Prenetan’s House
Go to Prenetan’s house and hear what all three girlfriends have to say.

title_zh: 山特樂曼：值得信任的冒險家
desc_zh: 蘇埃爾特似乎將冒險家視為值得信任的人。
desc_en: It seems Suerte has come to see you as someone they can trust.

title_zh: 山特樂曼：幻想維護補修
desc_zh: 發樂斯燈塔前的蘇埃爾特的委託是消滅工蟻、白蟻、兵蟻各20隻。
desc_en: In front of Pharos Lighthouse, Suerte asks you to defeat 20 each of Pierre, Andre, and Deniro.
chain: 山特樂曼：幻想維護補修

title_zh: 山特樂曼：幻想維護補修-等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過發樂斯燈塔的蘇埃爾特領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest. Once the waiting period ends, you can accept it again. Get the quest from Suerte at Pharos Lighthouse.
chain: 山特樂曼：幻想維護補修

desc_zh: 發樂斯燈塔前的蘇埃爾特的委託是獵捕 奈吉鳥30隻。
desc_en: In front of Pharos Lighthouse, Suerte asks you to defeat 30 Raggler.

title_zh: 山特樂曼：護衛的問題-等候
desc_en:
This is a daily quest. Once the waiting period ends, you can accept it again.
Get the quest from Suerte at Pharos Lighthouse.

title_zh: 山特樂曼：應對未來的姿態
title_en: Saint Darmain: Preparing for the Future
desc_zh: 發樂斯燈塔的閔磊的委託是擊退山特樂曼西邊地區的巨石怪。
desc_en: At Pharos Lighthouse, Min Rey asks you to defeat Golem on the west side of Fortress Saint Darmain.

title_zh: 山特樂曼：未來準備心態-等候
title_en: [Waiting] Saint Darmain: Preparing for the Future
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可重新領取並執行任務。可透過發樂斯燈塔的閔磊領取任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest. Once the waiting period ends, you can accept it again. Get the quest from Min Rey at Pharos Lighthouse.

title_zh: 山特樂曼：美術品的聲音
title_en: Saint Darmain: The Voice of Art
desc_zh: 發樂斯燈塔的閔磊的委託是清掃重金屬蝗蟲。
desc_en: At Pharos Lighthouse, Min Rey asks you to clear out the Metaller.
chain: 山特樂曼：美術品的聲音
chain_en: Sandelemann: The voice of the artwork

title_zh: 山特樂曼：美術品的聲音-等候
title_en: [Waiting] Saint Darmain: The Voice of Art
chain: 山特樂曼：美術品的聲音
chain_en: Sandelemann: The voice of the artwork

desc_zh: 營養點心
desc_en: Nutritious Snack

title_zh: 阿姨說找不到要給老公吃的蛋，很傷腦筋。幫他找來大嘴鳥蛋30個。
desc_zh: 大嘴鳥蛋30個
desc_en: Auntie is in trouble because she can’t find Peco Peco Eggs for her husband. Bring her 30 Peco Peco Egg.

desc_zh: 不幫阿姨的忙的話，阿姨的老公說不定會餓肚子。為了一個家庭的和諧，明天也幫他吧？
desc_en: If you leave Auntie alone, her husband may go hungry. For the sake of this family’s peace, will you help again tomorrow?

title_zh: 蘇克拉特：考古團實習生
desc_zh: 不知怎麼地就成了阿里巴斯考古團的實習生。考古團的團長阿里巴斯說，等準備好要工作時就去告訴他。
desc_en: Somehow, you’ve become an intern for the Alibas excavation team. Captain Alibas told you to speak to him when you’re ready to work.

title_zh: 既然是第一天，就去幫忙考古團所有人的工作當作是學習吧。去找米達、皮蒙、羅伊娜、弗里並協助工作。
title_en: To learn the ropes on your first day, help each team member with their tasks. Meet Mida, Pimon, Lonia, and Frick and help them with their work.

title_zh: [等候]蘇克拉特：考古團實習生
desc_zh: 團長阿里巴斯說實習生沒什麼重要的工作要做，想工作的話明天再來吧。
desc_en: It seems the leader, Alibas, doesn’t have anything too important for an intern. If you want to work, you’ll have to come back tomorrow.

title_zh: 團長阿里巴斯要求至少要幫忙4名考古團員中的2名再回來。米達、皮蒙、羅伊娜、弗里之中，要幫忙誰的工作呢？
title_en: The leader, Alibas, told you to help at least 2 of the 4 team members. Which task will you help with: Mida, Pimon, Lonia, or Frick?

title_zh: 蘇克拉特：考古團員米達
desc_zh: 協助了考古團員米達的工作。
desc_en: You helped with the work of Excavation Crew Mida.

title_zh: 蘇克拉特：考古皮蒙弗里
desc_zh: 協助了考古團員皮蒙的工作。
desc_en: You helped with the work of Excavation Crew Pimon.

title_zh: 蘇克拉特：考古團員羅伊娜
desc_zh: 協助了考古團員羅伊娜的工作。
desc_en: You helped with the work of Excavation Crew Lonia.

title_zh: 蘇克拉特：考古團員弗里
desc_zh: 協助了考古團員弗里的工作。
desc_en: You helped with the work of Excavation Crew Frick.

desc_zh: 發現有個男子倒地不起。為了叫醒他，去一點盛水來吧。
desc_en: You found a man collapsed on the ground. Fetch some water to wake him up.

title_zh: 在綠洲盛了一些水。喚醒昏倒的男子吧。
title_en: You drew water from the oasis. Wake the collapsed man.

title_zh: 男子中毒了。要解毒的話，需要5x 蠍子尾巴個。幫忙抓蠍子來給他吧。
title_en: The man appears to be poisoned. To perform Detoxify, he needs 5 [Scorpion Tail]904. Defeat Scorpion and bring them back.

title_zh: 男子恢復清醒了，跟他搭話吧。
title_en: The man has regained consciousness. Talk to him.

title_zh: 蘇克拉特：可疑的生命體
desc_zh: 迷路的學者想要研究泥人。幫忙抓泥人30隻給迷路的學者吧。
desc_en: Lost Scholar wants to study Sandman. Defeat 30 Sandman and report back to Lost Scholar.

title_zh: 迷路的學者對名叫傘蜥的生命體十分好奇。幫忙抓傘蜥30隻給迷路的學者吧。
title_en: Lost Scholar is also curious about a creature called Frilldora. Defeat 30 Frilldora and report back to Lost Scholar.
Sograt: Ingredients for a Local Specialty
desc_zh: 決定協助匠人製作1x 熱帶蘇格拉特飲料。在周邊的仙人掌上製造小小的傷口取得樹液，然後拿給匠人吧。
desc_en: You agreed to help the craftsman make [Tropical Sograt]12112. Make small cuts on nearby Cactus plants to collect sap and bring it to the craftsman.

desc_zh: 拿到仙人掌樹液了。拿去給匠人吧。
desc_en: You obtained Cactus sap. Bring it to the craftsman.

desc_zh: 被奇怪的巫師大叔纏上了。去找來8x 傑勒比結晶個、8x 毛個吧。傑勒比結晶可透過波利，毛可透過綠棉蟲取得。
desc_en:
8 Jellopy, 8 Soft Fluff
You were stopped by a strange Old Wizard. Collect 8 [Jellopy]909 and 8 [Soft Fluff]914.
Jellopy can be obtained from Poring, and Soft Fluff from Fabre.

title_zh: 奇怪的巫師大叔將魔法注入找來的傑勒比結晶和毛中。好像是要你去讓周圍的樹木吸收後再回來的樣子。
title_en: The strange Old Wizard infused magic into the Jellopy and Soft Fluff. He asks you to let the nearby trees absorb the magic.

desc_zh: 為每棵樹取名的巫師大叔好像希望你明天可以再來。不忙的話，去找他的時候記得戴上1x 傑勒比結晶和1x 毛。
desc_en: The Old Wizard, who names each tree one by one, seems to want you to return tomorrow. If you have time, please bring [Jellopy]909 and [Soft Fluff]914 again.

title_zh: 幫巫師大叔找來8x 傑勒比結晶個、8x 毛個吧。傑勒比結晶可透過波利，毛可透過綠棉蟲取得。
title_en: Bring 8 [Jellopy]909 and 8 [Soft Fluff]914 to the Old Wizard. Jellopy can be obtained from Poring, and Soft Fluff from Fabre.

title_zh: 巫師大叔讓周圍的樹木吸收注入了魔力的傑勒比結晶和毛。
title_en: Let the Jellopy and Soft Fluff, infused with magic by the Old Wizard, be absorbed by the nearby trees.

desc_zh: 巫師大叔讓樹木吸收注入了魔力的傑勒比結晶和毛。
desc_en: The Jellopy and Soft Fluff infused with magic by the Old Wizard have been absorbed.

desc_zh: 沼澤的精靈說為了拯救逐漸消失的沼澤地，需要很多青蛙蛋。幫忙收集6x 青蛙蛋個，並帶給沼澤的精靈吧。
desc_en:
6 Frog Egg
Swamp Fairy says she needs many Frog Egg to restore the fading swamp. Collect 6 [Frog Egg]908 and bring them to Swamp Fairy.

title_zh: 沼澤的精靈請求把剛剛收集來的青蛙蛋灑在草叢叢生的沼澤、乾涸的沼澤、枯樹倒下的沼澤三個地方。灑完之後回去找 沼澤的精靈吧。
title_en: Swamp Fairy asks you to scatter the collected Frog Egg at three locations: Overgrown Swamp, Drying Swamp, and Fallen Old Tree Swamp. After scattering them all, return to Swamp Fairy.

desc_zh: 把青蛙蛋灑在了草叢叢生的沼澤。回去找沼澤的精靈吧。
desc_en: You scattered Frog Egg at the overgrown swamp. Once finished, return to Swamp Fairy.

desc_zh: 把青蛙蛋灑在了乾涸的沼澤。回去找沼澤的精靈吧。
desc_en: You scattered Frog Egg at the Drying Swamp. Once finished, return to Swamp Fairy.

desc_zh: 把青蛙蛋灑在了枯樹倒下的沼澤。回去找沼澤的精靈吧。
desc_en: You scattered Frog Egg at the Fallen Old Tree Swamp. Once finished, return to Swamp Fairy.

desc_zh: 從新手冒險家那邊聽到了有趣的情報。據說原野的某處藏著寶物，去找找看吧。
desc_en:
Search for the treasure.
You heard an interesting rumor from a Novice Adventurer. They say a treasure is hidden somewhere in the field. Search for the treasure.

desc_zh: 修理橋樑階段1，搗碎1x 傑勒比結晶填入縫隙中。階段2，覆蓋上1x 堅硬外殼。階段3，大喊「黎明的光啊∼」。一直修理到覺得沒問題為止吧。
desc_en:
1 Jellopy, 1 Hard Shell
Bridge repair step 1: Crush [Jellopy]909 and pack it into the gaps. Step 2: Place [Hard Shell]935 on top. Step 3: Shout '^0000FFO light of dawn~^000000'. Keep repairing until it feels sufficient.
objective_zh: 傑勒比結晶1個、堅硬外殼1個

title_zh: 橋樑該修的部分應該都修好了。回去找橋梁修理工 羅恩領取報酬吧。
title_en: The bridge seems sufficiently repaired. Return to Bridge Repairer Laon to receive your reward.

desc_zh: 每天都可以進行吉芬北邊橋樑維修工作。明天去找[橋梁修理工 羅恩]gef_fild04,210,58,000,0吧。
desc_en: The northern bridge repair work in Geffen can be done daily. Visit Bridge Repairer Laon again tomorrow.

title_zh: 吉芬：我也要克瑞米卡片
title_en: Geffen: I Want a Creamy Card Too
desc_zh: 正在認真抓克瑞米的魔法師青年的願望是親眼看到1x 克瑞米卡片一次。請捕捉 克瑞米2隻，要是有卡片的話就給去給他看看吧。
desc_en:
Creamy Card
The wish of the young Mage, who is diligently hunting Creamy, is to see a [Creamy Card]4040 at least once. Defeat 2 Creamy and, if you obtain the card, show it to him.

desc_zh: 修理橋樑階段1，將1x 傑勒比結晶放入裂縫中。階段2，覆蓋上1x 堅硬外殼。階段3，大喊「風的悲傷啊∼」。一直修理到覺得沒問題為止吧。
desc_en: Bridge repair step 1: Place [Jellopy]909 into the Cracked Rift. Step 2: Set [Hard Shell]935 on top. Step 3: Shout '^0000FFO sorrow of the wind~^000000'. Keep repairing until no further repairs are needed.

title_zh: 橋樑該修的部分應該都修好了。回去找橋梁修理工 席安領取報酬吧。
title_en: You finished repairing the bridge. Return to Bridge Repairer Sion to receive your reward.

title_zh: 每天都可以進行吉芬北邊橋樑維修工作。明天去找橋梁修理工 席安吧。
title_en: West bridge repairs in Geffen can be done daily. Visit Bridge Repairer Sion again tomorrow.

desc_zh: 坐在水中的初學者說松鼠太吵了，害自己釣不到魚，於是委託捕捉松鼠30隻。抓好松鼠之後回去找初學者吧。
desc_en: A Novice sitting in the water says the Coco are too noisy to fish. Defeat 30 Coco, then return to Novice.

title_zh: 即使抓了松鼠似乎也沒什麼效果，初學者有了別的計畫。去把30個1x 橡實埋在上游吧。
desc_zh: 橡實30個
desc_en: Defeating Coco didn’t help, so the Novice came up with a new plan. Go to upstream and bury 30 [Acorn]1026.

title_zh: 把橡實埋在上游了。回去找初學者領取報酬吧。
title_en: You buried the Acorn upstream. Return to the fishing Novice to receive your reward.

desc_zh: 從引導者張青龍那邊聽說崑崙堂主史豔文想會面的消息。去拜訪堂主 史豔文吧。
desc_en: I heard from the leader Zhang Qinglong that Kunlun Hall Master Shi Yanwen wanted to meet. Go visit the hall leader Shi Yanwen.

desc_zh: 崑崙堂主 史豔文說，不知從何時開始，村子便瀰漫著險的氛圍。根據啟示，解決凶險氛圍的冒險家將來到崑崙…先看看村子裡有沒有需要幫助的人吧。
desc_en: Shi Yanwen, the leader of Kunlun Hall, said that the village has been filled with a dangerous atmosphere since I don’t know when. According to the revelation, adventurers who solve the dangerous atmosphere will come to Kunlun... Let's first see if there is anyone in the village who needs help.

desc_zh: 咸連翹表示自己眼睜睜看著強大的道力支離破碎，深感不安，必須趕緊使道力歸位。去西王母神殿尋找五塊散落的道力碎片吧。
desc_en: Xian Lianqiao said that he was deeply disturbed as he watched the powerful Tao power fall apart, and he must quickly restore the Tao power to its proper place. Go to the Temple of the West Queen Mother to find five scattered Daoli fragments.
objective_zh: 永耀咸目睹了強大的道力碎裂四散，感到十分不安，並說必須盡快將其恢復原狀。神仙的遊樂場去找回散落的五塊道力碎片吧。
objective_en: Yong Yaoxian felt very uneasy when he witnessed the powerful Dao power shattered and scattered, and said that it must be restored to its original state as soon as possible. Go to the Fairyland to retrieve the five scattered Doli fragments.

desc_zh: 昆侖西王母神殿(1)
desc_en: Kunlun West Queen Mother Temple(1)

desc_zh: 咸連翹表示由於道力衰退，無法感知到劍的碎片。等咸連翹的道力恢復再去找他吧。
desc_en: Xian Forsythia said that due to the decline of Tao power, she could not sense the fragments of the sword. Let's wait until Xian Forsythia's Dao power recovers before looking for him.

desc_zh: 咸連翹表示自己眼睜睜看著強大的道力支離破碎，深感不安，必須趕緊使道力歸位。去神仙的圍棋臺尋找十塊散落的道力碎片吧。
desc_en: Xian Lianqiao said that he was deeply disturbed as he watched the powerful Tao power fall apart, and he must quickly restore the Tao power to its proper place. Go to the Immortal Go table to find ten scattered Doli fragments.

desc_zh: 咸連翹希望把碎裂的劍碎片帶給堂主 史豔文。把劍碎片拿去給堂主 史豔文吧。
desc_en: Xian Forsythia hopes to bring the broken sword fragments to the hall leader Shi Yanwen. Take the sword fragment to Hall Master Shi Yanwen.

desc_zh: 堂主 史豔文表示能修復四散的見碎片的除了溫伽樂之外別無他人。去找溫伽樂吧。
desc_en: Hall leader Shi Yanwen said that only Wen Jiale can repair the scattered fragments. Go find Wenjiale.

desc_zh: 堂主 史豔文委託你去向發現劍碎片的咸連翹致謝。去找咸連翹吧。
desc_en: Hall Master Shi Yanwen entrusts you to express your gratitude to Xian Forsythia who found the sword fragment. Go find salty forsythia.

desc_zh: 溫伽樂不在家，他的孫女說爺爺去了醫院爺爺家。
desc_en: Wen Jiale was not at home, and his granddaughter said that grandpa went to his house in the hospital.

desc_zh: 去醫院是指溫伽樂為了孫女的藥去武陵道院找藥草，去找溫伽樂吧。
desc_en: Going to the hospital means that Wenjiale went to Wuling Taoist Temple to find herbs for her granddaughter's medicine. Let's go to Wenjiale.

desc_zh: 決定替溫伽樂捕捉人蔘精，收集40x 稀有的藥草個交給醫院。取得藥草後去醫院吧。
desc_en: Decided to capture ginseng essence for Wenjiale, collect 40x rare herbs and hand them over to the hospital. After getting the herbs, go to the hospital.

desc_zh: 聽醫院方面說向溫伽樂委託的東西好像完成了，要你去看看。去找溫伽樂吧。
desc_en: I heard from the hospital that the things entrusted to Wenjiale seem to be completed, and they want you to go and take a look. Go find Wenjiale.

desc_zh: 溫伽樂依照委託將四分五裂的1x 靈幻道士之劍修好了。帶著劍去找堂主 史豔文吧。
desc_en: Wen Jiale repaired the broken 1x Phantom Taoist Sword according to the request. Bring the sword to the hall leader Shi Yanwen.

desc_zh: 崑崙鐵匠溫伽樂想報答給孫女藥的事。將劍給堂主 史豔文看之後回去找 溫伽樂吧。
desc_en: Kunlun blacksmith Wen Jiale wanted to repay his granddaughter for giving her medicine. Give the sword to the hall leader Shi Yanwen and then go back to find Wen Jiale.

desc_zh: 持著1x 靈幻道士之劍消滅妖怪猴桃木的話，好像可以得到妖怪的精髓。先消滅猴桃木40隻看看吧。
desc_en: If you kill the monster Kiwi with 1x Phantom Taoist Sword, you can get the essence of the monster. Let's kill 40 kiwi trees first and see.

desc_zh: 堂主 史豔文將靈幻道士之劍放回原位。1小時後再來找堂主 史豔文吧。
desc_en: Hall leader Shi Yanwen put the magic Taoist sword back to its original position. Come back to the hall leader Shi Yanwen in 1 hour.

desc_zh: 經過怎麼看都不像是私人土地的地方時遇見了埃提拉，他拜託幫忙獵捕破壞田地的狸貓。消滅狸貓10隻吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 10 Smokie
You met Etila while passing through what doesn’t seem to be private property. She asks you to hunt the Smokie that ruined her garden. Defeat 10 Smokie.

title_zh: 高麗菜的仇人狸貓 - 等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可透過埃提拉重新領取並執行任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Etila.

title_zh: 再次高麗菜的仇人狸貓
desc_zh: 怒火中燒的埃提拉請求再多消滅狸貓10隻。
desc_en: Still furious, Etila asks you to defeat 10 more Smokie.

title_zh: 將心意傾注於彩色昆蟲外殼
desc_zh: 劍士亞樂底斯自己把青春完全寄託在從小收集的彩色昆蟲外殼上，為了讓他快點放棄這種想法，迅速處理委託吧。
desc_en:
30 Colorful Shell
Swordman Iardis has spent his youth chasing the Colorful Shell he’s wanted since childhood. Handle this request quickly so he can come to his senses.

desc_zh: 在懸崖上釣魚的赫日喜把1x 猴子尾巴當成魚餌使用。試著從溜溜猴那邊取得釣魚用誘餌吧。
desc_en:
10 Monkey Tail
Harsi, fishing atop the cliff, uses [Monkey Tail]942 as bait. Collect bait from Yoyo.

desc_zh: 抓溜溜猴時偶爾掉落的香蕉也可以當作釣魚用誘餌。拿去給在懸崖上釣魚的赫日喜吧。
desc_en:
10 Banana
He also uses Banana, which Yoyo sometimes drop, as bait. Bring 10 Banana to Harsi on the cliff.

desc_zh: 受塔洛閃之託，決定幫忙捕捉蝸牛20隻。從塔洛閃所在地往西走就會出現蝸牛的棲息地。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Ambernite
At Tarosan's request, you agreed to defeat 20 Ambernite. Their habitat lies west of where Tarosan is.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可透過塔洛閃重新領取並執行任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Tarosan.

desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外的彌爾說媽媽說附近的蟲子太多，不准出去玩。幫忙撲殺彌爾媽媽討厭的小盜蟲和盜蟲卵吧。
desc_en:
Defeat Thief Bug and Thief Bug Egg
Mel outside the west gate of Prontera says there are too many bugs around here, so her mom won’t let her play outside. Defeat Thief Bug and Thief Bug Egg—the ones Mel’s mom hates.
objective_en: Eliminate small thieves and thieves eggs

title_zh: 媽媽說討厭的東西 - 等候
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可透過彌爾重新領取並執行任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Mel.

desc_zh: 普隆德拉西門外的彌爾說媽媽說附近的蟲子太多，不准出去玩。幫忙撲殺彌爾媽媽討厭的小盜蟲和盜蟲卵吧。
desc_en: Mel outside the west gate of Prontera says there are too many bugs around here, so her mom won’t let her play outside. Defeat the Thief Bug and Thief Bug Egg her mom hates.

desc_zh: 薑餅城南邊雪原的某處有個穿著雪人玩偶裝的調查員。他的委託是消滅妨礙他調查冰波利的雪熊。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Sasquatch
Somewhere in the snowy field south of Lutie, an Investigator is wearing a snowman costume. To investigate Marin, he asks you to defeat the Sasquatch getting in the way.

desc_zh: 史窪勒斯說摩卡只要一看到他就躲開，根本抓不到。他的委託內容是打擊摩卡，讓摩卡知道世界上有比他更強的人。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Muka
Svalas says the Muka keep avoiding him. To make them realize there are stronger foes than him, he asks you to defeat 20 Muka.

desc_zh: 受薩勒卡之託，要捕捉羅達蛙20隻。雖然沒有說原因，但可以期待一下報酬。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Roda Frog
At Sarka's request, defeat 20 Roda Frog. He says he can’t explain why, but you can expect a reward.

desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可透過薩勒卡重新領取並執行任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Sarka.

desc_zh: 在薩勒卡的委託下要捕捉羅達蛙20隻。難免會沾到一點黏液。
desc_en: At Sarka's request, defeat 20 Roda Frog. You’ll likely end up covered in slime.

desc_zh: 收到了消滅妨礙伊夕爾雷因通行的曼陀羅魔花20隻的委託。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Mandragora
Isilain asks you to defeat 20 Mandragora that are blocking the path.

title_en: I Want to Get Closer - Pending
desc_zh: 該任務為每日任務，等候時間過後可透過伊夕爾雷因重新領取並執行任務。
desc_en: This is a daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Isilain.
chain_en: Although I want to get closer

desc_zh: 收到了消滅妨礙伊夕爾雷因通行的曼陀羅魔花 20隻的委託。
desc_en: Isilain asks you to defeat 20 Mandragora blocking the path.
chain_en: Although I want to get closer

desc_zh: 可凌對於自己的軟弱無能感到挫折，決定放棄親自獵捕，出門購買蝗蟲後腿。試著掃蕩搖滾蝗蟲並取得蝗蟲後腿吧。
desc_en:
Collect 20 Grasshopper Hind Leg
Garim, discouraged by his own weakness, has given up hunting and waits here to buy Grasshopper Hind Leg. Defeat Rocker and collect the hind legs.

title_en: It Keeps Appearing in My Dreams
desc_zh: 夢裡出現要求消滅冒險家的魔鍋蛋，擾了拓凌的清夢。忍無可忍的拓凌委託掃蕩魔鍋蛋，並取來破舊平底鍋20個。
desc_en:
Collect 20 Old Frying Pan
Magnolia appears in Dolin’s dreams, asking him to defeat adventurers and disturbing Dolin's sleep. Unable to endure it any longer, Dolin asks you to wipe out Magnolia and bring back 20 Old Frying Pans.

desc_zh: 在普隆德拉南邊城門正前方尋求紅蘿蔔的沃提拿說，紅蘿蔔田的紅蘿蔔全都被瘋兔搶走了，害得久久才回家一次的冒險家爸爸沒辦法做紅蘿蔔蛋糕。
desc_en:
Collect 10 Carrots
Otina gathers carrots right outside the south gate of Prontera. The carrots from the fields have all been taken by Lunatic, so an adventurer father who finally returned home can’t make carrot cake.

title_en: The Tree Spirit of the Lush Forest
desc_zh: 在森林裡休息的賈蒂斯好像在等人幫忙趁自己休息的時候清除長老樹精30隻。
desc_en:
Defeat Elder Willow
Jadis, who was resting in the forest, seems to have been waiting for someone to defeat 30 Elder Willow in his place.

desc_zh: 賈蒂斯請求取得要給小白的20x 橡實個。去消滅松鼠以收集橡實吧。
desc_en:
Collect 20 Acorn
Jadis asks you to bring 20 [Acorn]1026 for Whitey. Defeat Coco and gather Acorn.

desc_zh: 斐揚的守林人塞納想要透過轉盤確認其他守林人的狀況。將轉盤轉交給守林人圖里。
desc_en:
Talk to Forest Keeper Duri
Forest Keeper Sena of Payon wants to check on the other forest keepers using the roulette. Deliver it to Forest Keeper Duri.

desc_zh: 守林人圖里請你幫忙把轉盤轉交給守林人賀納。
desc_en:
Talk to Forest Keeper Hana
Forest Keeper Duri asks you to deliver the roulette to Forest Keeper Hana.

desc_zh: 守林人賀納確認過轉盤後，請你回去找守林人塞納。
desc_en:
Talk to Forest Keeper Sena
After checking the roulette, Forest Keeper Hana tells you to return to Forest Keeper Sena.

desc_zh: 守林人塞納因為大腳熊近來活動頻頻，可能會跨過森林邊界而憂心忡忡。表示除了減少個體數之外別無他法，委託獵捕大腳熊20隻。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Bigfoot
Forest Keeper Sena worries that the increasingly active Bigfoot may cross the forest boundary. With no choice, she asks you to control their numbers by defeating 20 Bigfoot.

desc_zh: 守林人塞納打算在短期內持續調整個體數。加入獵熊行動，消滅大腳熊20隻吧。
desc_en: Forest Keeper Sena plans to continue controlling the Bigfoot population for a while. Join the hunt and defeat 20 Bigfoot.

desc_zh: 該任務為可反覆執行的每日任務，等候時間結束後可透過守林人塞納再次領取。
desc_en: This is a repeatable daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Forest Keeper Sena.

title_en: The Culprit Gnawing at the Trees
desc_zh: 守林人圖里指出鍬形蟲是啃食數目的主犯，委託清除鍬形蟲。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Horn
Forest Keeper Duri has identified Horn as the culprit gnawing at the trees and asks you to deal with them.

desc_zh: 守林人圖里計畫在短期內持續獵捕鍬形蟲。協助圖里移除鍬形蟲20隻吧。
desc_en: Forest Keeper Duri plans to continue hunting Horn for a while. Help Duri and defeat 20 Horn.

desc_zh: 該任務為可反覆執行的每日任務，等候時間結束後可透過守林人圖里再次領取。
desc_en: This is a repeatable daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Forest Keeper Duri.

desc_zh: 原本是村子守護神的長生柱現在變成了受氣包魔物，令守林人賀納頭痛不已。和賀納一起消滅將軍魔碑吧。
desc_en:
Defeat 20 Greatest General
Forest Keeper Hana is troubled that the village’s former guardian totem has become a despised monster. Join Hana and defeat Greatest General.

desc_zh: 守林人賀納打算短期內專心處理長生柱的問題。協助賀納消滅將軍魔碑吧。
desc_en: Forest Keeper Hana plans to focus on handling the totems for a while. Help Hana and defeat Greatest General.
chain_en: Dealing with the Corrupted Pillar of Eternal Life

title_zh: 處理墮落的長生柱-等候
desc_zh: 該任務為可反覆執行的每日任務，等候時間結束後可透過守林人賀納再次領取。
desc_en: This is a repeatable daily quest. After the waiting time ends, you can accept it again from Forest Keeper Hana.
chain_en: Dealing with the Corrupted Pillar of Eternal Life

desc_zh: 為了調查突然在夢羅克出現的裂縫組成了調查團。為了取得裂縫資訊，和 NAVI>[夢羅克居民]morocc,248,178,0,101,0對話吧。
desc_en: A survey team was formed to investigate the cracks that suddenly appeared in Monroc. To obtain crack information, talk to NAVI>[Morroc Resident] morocc,248,178,0,101,0.
objective_en: Talk to the residents of Monrok

title_zh: 聽到夢羅克居民述說在裂縫內看到的東西，也去聽聽在夢羅克南邊工作的村民的故事吧。
title_en: Hear the residents of Morrok recount what they saw within the rift, and hear the stories of the villagers who work south of Morrok.
desc_zh: 與村民對話
desc_en: Talk to villagers

title_zh: 聽了村民的說法，去聽聽在夢羅克南邊武器店附近工作的朋友的故事吧。
title_en: After listening to the villagers, go and listen to the stories of friends who work near the weapons shop south of Monroc.
desc_zh: 與武器搬運工對話
desc_en: Talk to the weapons carrier

title_zh: 目睹裂縫的人比預期多，聽聽在夢羅克中央附近的朋友的故事吧。
title_en: More people than expected have witnessed the crack, hear the stories from friends near the center of Monroc.
desc_zh: 與水質管理員對話
desc_en: Talk to a water quality manager

title_zh: 水質管理員說在夢羅克北門附近見過衣著奇怪的人。不知道還在不在，先去看看吧。
title_en: Water quality managers reported seeing strangely dressed people near the north gate of Monroc. I don’t know if it’s still there, so let’s go check it out first.
desc_zh: 尋找衣著奇怪的人
desc_en: Looking for weirdly dressed people

title_zh: 阿丁好像很餓，前往可以買到食物的地點讓他吃點什麼吧。
title_en: Adin seems to be very hungry. Go to a place where you can buy food and let him eat something.
desc_zh: 尋找食物
desc_en: looking for food

title_zh: 阿龍取得有人看到穿著白色鳥服的人從夢羅克南門離開的情報，去南門外看看吧。
title_en: Aaron obtained the information that someone in a white bird suit was seen leaving the south gate of Monlock. Let's go and take a look outside the south gate.
desc_zh: 前往南門外
desc_en: Go to South Gate

title_zh: 阿龍和阿丁在夢羅克南門外發現可疑的怪獸。一起確認可疑的怪獸吧。
title_en: Aaron and Aden discovered a suspicious monster outside the southern gate of Mengluk. Let's identify the suspicious monster together.
desc_zh: 確認可疑的怪獸
desc_en: Confirm suspicious monster

title_zh: 惡魔黨的怪獸好像散佈在夢羅克附近，在附近擊殺惡魔黨波利和烏賊彈3隻後返回。
title_en: The monsters of the Demon Party seem to be scattered around Monroc. Kill 3 of the Demon Party's Polly and Squid Bomb nearby and then return.
desc_zh: 擊殺惡魔黨波利、烏賊彈
desc_en: Kill the devil party Polly and Squid Bomb

title_zh: 確認惡魔黨的怪獸的鐵雄說回到夢羅克整理狀況吧。返回夢羅克吧。
title_en: Tetsuo, who confirmed the demon party's monsters, said that he should return to Monrok to sort out the situation. Return to Monrok.
desc_zh: 前往夢羅克
desc_en: Heading to Monrok

title_zh: 鐵雄想了解米德加爾特的情況，去找[[緊急] 不規則裂縫調查團]morocc,196,261,0,101,0取得情報吧。
title_en: Tetsuo wants to know the situation in Midgard, so he should go to [[Emergency] Irregular Crack Investigation Team] morocc,196,261,0,101,0 to get information.
desc_zh: 去找裂縫接待員
desc_en: Go to the crack receptionist

title_zh: [緊急]不規則裂縫調查團正在管理裂縫，去確認裂縫吧。
title_en: [Emergency] The Irregular Crack Investigation Team is managing the cracks, please go check the cracks.
desc_zh: 與警備兵對話
desc_en: Talk to the guard

title_zh: 雖然未能從裂縫取得任何情報，但見到秘密調查中的惡魔黨士兵。跟蹤消失在某處的惡魔黨士兵吧。
title_en: Although we were unable to obtain any information from the cracks, we met Devil Party soldiers conducting a secret investigation. Follow the Devil's Party soldiers who disappeared somewhere.
desc_zh: 跟蹤惡魔黨士兵
desc_en: Tracking the Devil Party Soldiers

title_zh: 發現在隱藏的裂縫前對話中的皮爾，皮爾消失後調查裂縫吧。
title_en: Find Pierre talking in front of a hidden rift. After Pierre disappears, investigate the crack.
desc_zh: 確認裂縫
desc_en: Confirm crack

title_zh: 若按照皮爾所說，不能放任裂縫不管。穩定裂縫，確認裂縫內部吧。
title_en: According to what Peel said, cracks cannot be left alone. Stabilize the crack and check the inside of the crack.
desc_zh: ※ 記憶副本內導航可能不順暢。
desc_en: ※ Navigation within the memory copy may not be smooth.

title_zh: 確認裂縫內部了，和在夢羅克的鐵雄對話吧。
title_en: After confirming the inside of the crack, talk to Tetsuo in Monrok.
desc_zh: 與鐵雄對話
desc_en: Talk to Tetsuo

title_zh: 為了讓科學小飛俠可以返回地球，協助製作米德飛彈吧。擊殺惡魔黨波利與烏賊彈5隻，帶回可以作為材料的米德粉末5個。
title_en: In order for the scientific Peter Pan to return to Earth, help make the Meade missile. Kill 5 demon party Polly and Squid Bullets, and bring back 5 Mead powders that can be used as materials.
desc_zh: 收集材料
desc_en: Collect materials

desc_zh: 好像在避開皮爾修補裂縫裂縫，再次開戰吧。
desc_en: It seems that he is avoiding Peel to mend the cracks and cracks and start the war again.

desc_zh: 擊退惡魔黨並復原裂縫，到再次修補前能否安全呢？
desc_en: After defeating the demonic party and restoring the cracks, will it be safe before repairing it again?

desc_zh: [收集]製作米德飛彈所需的米德粉末10個，morocc,32,194,0,101,0米德粉末可以經由擊殺惡魔黨波利與烏賊彈取得。
desc_en: [Collect] 10 Meed powders required to make Meed missiles, morocc, 32,194,0,101,0 Meed powder can be obtained by killing the devil party Polly and Squid Bullets.

title_en: good! I want to destroy everything!
desc_zh: 為擊殺惡魔黨，擊殺夢羅克附近原野的惡魔黨波利10隻後 返回。
desc_en: In order to kill the devil party, kill 10 devil party Polly in the field near Monroc and then return.

title_zh: 惡魔黨的怪獸無法回到基地。
title_en: The demon party's monsters cannot return to base.
desc_zh: 為擊殺惡魔黨，擊殺夢羅克附近原野的烏賊彈10隻後 返回。
desc_en: In order to kill the demon party, kill 10 squid bombs in the field near Monroc and return.

desc_zh: 收集了米德粉末，明天再來吧。
desc_en: I collected the mead powder and come back tomorrow.

title_en: good! I want to destroy everything! -wait-
desc_zh: 擊殺惡魔黨波利了，明天再來吧。
desc_en: We've killed the devil party Polly, come back tomorrow.

title_zh: 惡魔黨的怪獸無法回到基地。等待-
title_en: The demon party's monsters cannot return to base. wait-
desc_zh: 擊殺烏賊彈了，明天再來吧。
desc_en: Killed the squid bomb, come back tomorrow.

desc_zh: 大明突然消失了。好像從西門離開了，去找找看吧
desc_en: Daming suddenly disappeared. It seems to have left from Ximen. Let’s go look for it.

title_zh: 大明突然消失了。好像從南門離開了，去找找看吧
title_en: Daming suddenly disappeared. It seems to have left through the south gate. Let's go look for it.

desc_zh: 大明平安無事。
desc_en: Ming Dynasty is safe and sound.
